Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*********************************************************************************

 Properties over equivalences over the identity

 In this file, we collect various properties of equivalences over the identity.

 Contents
 1. If a displayed functor is eso and ff, then its object map is an equivalence
 2. Essentially surjective functors are split essentially surjective
 3. Being an equivalence is a proposition
 4. Equivalences are (split) essentially surjective
 5. Equivalences are fully faithful
 6. Equivalences are cartesian
 7. Equivalences are opcartesian
 8. Equivalences over the identity and equivalences

 *********************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Univalence.

New coercion path [adjunction_of_right_adjoint_over_id_data;
                   left_adj_over_id] : right_adjoint_over_id_data >-> disp_functor is ambiguous with existing 
[functor_of_right_adjoint_over_id] : right_adjoint_over_id_data >-> disp_functor.
[ambiguous-paths,coercions,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Fibrations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.DisplayedFunctorEq.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope mor_disp.

(**
 1. If a displayed functor is eso and ff, then its object map is an equivalence
 *)

C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
isaprop (hfiber (FF x) yy)


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
isaprop (hfiber (FF x) yy)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
isProofIrrelevant (hfiber (FF x) yy)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
φ₁, φ₂: hfiber (FF x) yy
φ₁ = φ₂

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
ww₁: D₁ x
ι₁: FF x ww₁ = yy
φ₂: hfiber (FF x) yy
ww₁,, ι₁ = φ₂

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
ww₁: D₁ x
ι₁: FF x ww₁ = yy
ww₂: D₁ x
ι₂: FF x ww₂ = yy
ww₁,, ι₁ = ww₂,, ι₂

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
ww₁: D₁ x
ι₁: FF x ww₁ = yy
ww₂: D₁ x
ι₂: FF x ww₂ = yy
p: ∑ p : ww₁ = ww₂, maponpaths (FF x) p = ι₁ @ ! ι₂
ww₁,, ι₁ = ww₂,, ι₂

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

D₂: disp_cat C₂

HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂

HFF: disp_functor_ff FF

yy: D₂ (F x)
ww₁: D₁ x
ι₁: FF x ww₁ = yy
ww₂: D₁ x
ι₂: FF x ww₂ = yy
∑ p : ww₁ = ww₂, maponpaths (FF x) p = ι₁ @ ! ι₂

D₂: disp_cat C₂

HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂

HFF: disp_functor_ff FF

yy: D₂ (F x)
ww₁: D₁ x
ι₁: FF x ww₁ = yy
ww₂: D₁ x
ι₂: FF x ww₂ = yy
p: ∑ p : ww₁ = ww₂, maponpaths (FF x) p = ι₁ @ ! ι₂

C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
ww₁: D₁ x
ι₁: FF x ww₁ = yy
ww₂: D₁ x
ι₂: FF x ww₂ = yy
p: ∑ p : ww₁ = ww₂, maponpaths (FF x) p = ι₁ @ ! ι₂
pr1 (ww₁,, ι₁) = pr1 (ww₂,, ι₂)
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
ww₁: D₁ x
ι₁: FF x ww₁ = yy
ww₂: D₁ x
ι₂: FF x ww₂ = yy
p: ∑ p : ww₁ = ww₂, maponpaths (FF x) p = ι₁ @ ! ι₂
transportf (λ x0 : D₁ x, FF x x0 = yy) ?p
  (pr2 (ww₁,, ι₁)) = pr2 (ww₂,, ι₂)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
ww₁: D₁ x
ι₁: FF x ww₁ = yy
ww₂: D₁ x
ι₂: FF x ww₂ = yy
p: ∑ p : ww₁ = ww₂, maponpaths (FF x) p = ι₁ @ ! ι₂
pr1 (ww₁,, ι₁) = pr1 (ww₂,, ι₂)
 exact (pr1 p).
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
ww₁: D₁ x
ι₁: FF x ww₁ = yy
ww₂: D₁ x
ι₂: FF x ww₂ = yy
p: ∑ p : ww₁ = ww₂, maponpaths (FF x) p = ι₁ @ ! ι₂
transportf (λ x0 : D₁ x, FF x x0 = yy) (pr1 p)
  (pr2 (ww₁,, ι₁)) = pr2 (ww₂,, ι₂)
 
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
ww₁: D₁ x
ι₁: FF x ww₁ = yy
ww₂: D₁ x
ι₂: FF x ww₂ = yy
p: ∑ p : ww₁ = ww₂, maponpaths (FF x) p = ι₁ @ ! ι₂
! maponpaths (FF x) (pr1 p) @
pr2 (ww₁,, ι₁) @ maponpaths (λ _ : D₁ x, yy) (pr1 p) =
pr2 (ww₂,, ι₂)

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

HFF: disp_functor_ff FF

ι₁: FF x ww₁ = yy
ww₂: D₁ x
ι₂: FF x ww₂ = yy
p: ∑ p : ww₁ = ww₂, maponpaths (FF x) p = ι₁ @ ! ι₂
! maponpaths (FF x) (pr1 p) @
ι₁ @ maponpaths (λ _ : D₁ x, yy) (pr1 p) = ι₂

p: ∑ p : ww₁ = ww₂, maponpaths (FF x) p = ι₁ @ ! ι₂
! maponpaths (FF x) (pr1 p) @ ι₁ @ idpath yy = ι₂

ι₂: FF x ww₂ = yy
p: ∑ p : ww₁ = ww₂, maponpaths (FF x) p = ι₁ @ ! ι₂
ι₂ @ idpath yy = ι₂

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂

HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂

HFF: disp_functor_ff FF

yy: D₂ (F x)
ww₁: D₁ x
ι₁: FF x ww₁ = yy
ww₂: D₁ x
ι₂: FF x ww₂ = yy
p: ∑ p : ww₁ = ww₂, maponpaths (FF x) p = ι₁ @ ! ι₂
ι₂ = ι₂

      apply idpath.
  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
ww₁: D₁ x
ι₁: FF x ww₁ = yy
ww₂: D₁ x
ι₂: FF x ww₂ = yy
∑ p : ww₁ = ww₂, maponpaths (FF x) p = ι₁ @ ! ι₂

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
ww₁: D₁ x
ι₁: FF x ww₁ = yy
ww₂: D₁ x
ι₂: FF x ww₂ = yy
p: ∑ p : z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) ww₁ ww₂,
♯ FF p =
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧,
   FF x ww₁ -->[ z] FF x ww₂) (functor_id F x)
  (pr1 (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) (ι₁ @ ! ι₂)))
∑ p : ww₁ = ww₂, maponpaths (FF x) p = ι₁ @ ! ι₂
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
ww₁: D₁ x
ι₁: FF x ww₁ = yy
ww₂: D₁ x
ι₂: FF x ww₂ = yy
∑ p : z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) ww₁ ww₂,
♯ FF p =
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, FF x ww₁ -->[ z] FF x ww₂)
  (functor_id F x)
  (pr1 (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) (ι₁ @ ! ι₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
ww₁: D₁ x
ι₁: FF x ww₁ = yy
ww₂: D₁ x
ι₂: FF x ww₂ = yy
p: ∑ p : z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) ww₁ ww₂,
♯ FF p =
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧,
   FF x ww₁ -->[ z] FF x ww₂) (functor_id F x)
  (pr1 (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) (ι₁ @ ! ι₂)))
∑ p : ww₁ = ww₂, maponpaths (FF x) p = ι₁ @ ! ι₂

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
ww₁: D₁ x
ι₁: FF x ww₁ = yy
ww₂: D₁ x
ι₂: FF x ww₂ = yy
p: ∑ p : z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) ww₁ ww₂,
♯ FF p =
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧,
   FF x ww₁ -->[ z] FF x ww₂) (functor_id F x)
  (pr1 (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) (ι₁ @ ! ι₂)))
maponpaths (FF x)
  (isotoid_disp HD₁ (idpath x) (pr1 p)) = ι₁ @ ! ι₂

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
ww₁: D₁ x
ι₁: FF x ww₁ = yy
ww₂: D₁ x
ι₂: FF x ww₂ = yy
p: ∑ p : z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) ww₁ ww₂,
♯ FF p =
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧,
   FF x ww₁ -->[ z] FF x ww₂) (functor_id F x)
  (pr1 (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) (ι₁ @ ! ι₂)))
(λ ee : transportf D₂ (idpath (F x)) ((pr11 FF) x ww₁) =
        FF x ww₂, idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) ee)
  (maponpaths (FF x)
     (isotoid_disp HD₁ (idpath x) (pr1 p))) =
(λ ee : transportf D₂ (idpath (F x)) ((pr11 FF) x ww₁) =
        FF x ww₂, idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) ee)
  (ι₁ @ ! ι₂)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
ww₁: D₁ x
ι₁: FF x ww₁ = yy
ww₂: D₁ x
ι₂: FF x ww₂ = yy
p: ∑ p : z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) ww₁ ww₂,
♯ FF p =
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧,
   FF x ww₁ -->[ z] FF x ww₂) (functor_id F x)
  (pr1 (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) (ι₁ @ ! ι₂)))
idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
  (maponpaths (FF x)
     (isotoid_disp HD₁ (idpath x) (pr1 p))) =
idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) (ι₁ @ ! ι₂)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
ww₁: D₁ x
ι₁: FF x ww₁ = yy
ww₂: D₁ x
ι₂: FF x ww₂ = yy
p: ∑ p : z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) ww₁ ww₂,
♯ FF p =
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧,
   FF x ww₁ -->[ z] FF x ww₂) (functor_id F x)
  (pr1 (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) (ι₁ @ ! ι₂)))
pr1
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x))
     (maponpaths (FF x)
        (isotoid_disp HD₁ (idpath x) (pr1 p)))) =
pr1 (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) (ι₁ @ ! ι₂))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
ww₁: D₁ x
ι₁: FF x ww₁ = yy
ww₂: D₁ x
ι₂: FF x ww₂ = yy
p: ∑ p : z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) ww₁ ww₂,
♯ FF p =
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧,
   FF x ww₁ -->[ z] FF x ww₂) (functor_id F x)
  (pr1 (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) (ι₁ @ ! ι₂)))
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, FF x ww₁ -->[ z] FF x ww₂)
  (functor_id F x)
  (♯ FF
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
        (isotoid_disp HD₁ (idpath x) (pr1 p)))) =
pr1 (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) (ι₁ @ ! ι₂))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
ww₁: D₁ x
ι₁: FF x ww₁ = yy
ww₂: D₁ x
ι₂: FF x ww₂ = yy
p: ∑ p : z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) ww₁ ww₂,
♯ FF p =
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧,
   FF x ww₁ -->[ z] FF x ww₂) (functor_id F x)
  (pr1 (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) (ι₁ @ ! ι₂)))
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, FF x ww₁ -->[ z] FF x ww₂)
  (functor_id F x) (♯ FF (pr1 p)) =
pr1 (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) (ι₁ @ ! ι₂))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
ww₁: D₁ x
ι₁: FF x ww₁ = yy
ww₂: D₁ x
ι₂: FF x ww₂ = yy
p: ∑ p : z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) ww₁ ww₂,
♯ FF p =
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧,
   FF x ww₁ -->[ z] FF x ww₂) (functor_id F x)
  (pr1 (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) (ι₁ @ ! ι₂)))
♯ FF (pr1 p) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF x ww₁) (FF x ww₂))
  (functor_id F x)
  (pr1 (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) (ι₁ @ ! ι₂)))

    exact (pr2 p).
  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
ww₁: D₁ x
ι₁: FF x ww₁ = yy
ww₂: D₁ x
ι₂: FF x ww₂ = yy
∑ p : z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) ww₁ ww₂,
♯ FF p =
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, FF x ww₁ -->[ z] FF x ww₂)
  (functor_id F x)
  (pr1 (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) (ι₁ @ ! ι₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
ww₁: D₁ x
ι₁: FF x ww₁ = yy
ww₂: D₁ x
ι₂: FF x ww₂ = yy
ff:= disp_functor_ff_inv FF HFF
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧,
      FF x ww₁ -->[ z] FF x ww₂) (functor_id F x)
     (pr1
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) (ι₁ @ ! ι₂)))): ww₁ -->[ identity x] ww₂
∑ p : z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) ww₁ ww₂,
♯ FF p =
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, FF x ww₁ -->[ z] FF x ww₂)
  (functor_id F x)
  (pr1 (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) (ι₁ @ ! ι₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
ww₁: D₁ x
ι₁: FF x ww₁ = yy
ww₂: D₁ x
ι₂: FF x ww₂ = yy
ff:= disp_functor_ff_inv FF HFF
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧,
      FF x ww₁ -->[ z] FF x ww₂) (functor_id F x)
     (pr1
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) (ι₁ @ ! ι₂)))): ww₁ -->[ identity x] ww₂
(λ ff : ww₁ -->[ identity_z_iso x] ww₂,
 is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) ff) ff
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
ww₁: D₁ x
ι₁: FF x ww₁ = yy
ww₂: D₁ x
ι₂: FF x ww₂ = yy
ff:= disp_functor_ff_inv FF HFF
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧,
      FF x ww₁ -->[ z] FF x ww₂) (functor_id F x)
     (pr1
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) (ι₁ @ ! ι₂)))): ww₁ -->[ identity x] ww₂
(λ p : z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) ww₁ ww₂,
 ♯ FF p =
 transportb
   (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, FF x ww₁ -->[ z] FF x ww₂)
   (functor_id F x)
   (pr1 (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) (ι₁ @ ! ι₂))))
  (ff,, ?pr2)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
ww₁: D₁ x
ι₁: FF x ww₁ = yy
ww₂: D₁ x
ι₂: FF x ww₂ = yy
ff:= disp_functor_ff_inv FF HFF
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧,
      FF x ww₁ -->[ z] FF x ww₂) (functor_id F x)
     (pr1
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) (ι₁ @ ! ι₂)))): ww₁ -->[ identity x] ww₂
(λ ff : ww₁ -->[ identity_z_iso x] ww₂,
 is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) ff) ff
 
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
ww₁: D₁ x
ι₁: FF x ww₁ = yy
ww₂: D₁ x
ι₂: FF x ww₂ = yy
ff:= disp_functor_ff_inv FF HFF
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧,
      FF x ww₁ -->[ z] FF x ww₂) (functor_id F x)
     (pr1
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) (ι₁ @ ! ι₂)))): ww₁ -->[ identity x] ww₂
is_z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F (identity_z_iso x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, FF x ww₁ -->[ z] FF x ww₂)
     (functor_id F x)
     (pr1 (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) (ι₁ @ ! ι₂))))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
ww₁: D₁ x
ι₁: FF x ww₁ = yy
ww₂: D₁ x
ι₂: FF x ww₂ = yy
ff:= disp_functor_ff_inv FF HFF
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧,
      FF x ww₁ -->[ z] FF x ww₂) (functor_id F x)
     (pr1
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) (ι₁ @ ! ι₂)))): ww₁ -->[ identity x] ww₂
is_z_iso_disp (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))
  (pr1 (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) (ι₁ @ ! ι₂)))

    apply idtoiso_disp.
  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
ww₁: D₁ x
ι₁: FF x ww₁ = yy
ww₂: D₁ x
ι₂: FF x ww₂ = yy
ff:= disp_functor_ff_inv FF HFF
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧,
      FF x ww₁ -->[ z] FF x ww₂) (functor_id F x)
     (pr1
        (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) (ι₁ @ ! ι₂)))): ww₁ -->[ identity x] ww₂
(λ p : z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) ww₁ ww₂,
 ♯ FF p =
 transportb
   (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧, FF x ww₁ -->[ z] FF x ww₂)
   (functor_id F x)
   (pr1 (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) (ι₁ @ ! ι₂))))
  (ff,,
   FFinv_on_z_iso_is_z_iso FF HFF
     (transportb
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, F x ⟧,
         FF x ww₁ -->[ z] FF x ww₂) (functor_id F x)
        (pr1 (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) (ι₁ @ ! ι₂))))
     (is_z_iso_disp_transportb_fun_eq
        (idtoiso (idpath (F x)))
        (pr1 (idtoiso_disp (idpath (F x)) (ι₁ @ ! ι₂)))
        (functor_id F x)
        (let X :=
           λ (e : F x = F x) (xx xx' : D₂ (F x))
           (ee : transportf D₂ e xx = xx'),
           pr2 (idtoiso_disp e ee) in
         X (idpath (F x)) (FF x ww₁) (FF x ww₂)
           (ι₁ @ ! ι₂))))
 apply FF_disp_functor_ff_inv.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF₁: disp_functor_disp_ess_surj FF
HFF₂: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
isweq (FF x)


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂

HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂

HFF₂: disp_functor_ff FF

isweq (FF x)

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

D₂: disp_cat C₂

HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂

HFF₂: disp_functor_ff FF

iscontr (hfiber (FF x) yy)

D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂

isaprop (iscontr (hfiber (FF x) yy))
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF₁: disp_functor_disp_ess_surj FF
HFF₂: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
(∑ xx : D₁ x,
 z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) (FF x xx) yy)
→ iscontr (hfiber (FF x) yy)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂

HFF₁: disp_functor_disp_ess_surj FF
HFF₂: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
isaprop (iscontr (hfiber (FF x) yy))

    apply isapropiscontr.

HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂

HFF₂: disp_functor_ff FF

yy: D₂ (F x)
(∑ xx : D₁ x,
 z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) (FF x xx) yy)
→ iscontr (hfiber (FF x) yy)

HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂

HFF₂: disp_functor_ff FF

yy: D₂ (F x)
xx: ∑ xx : D₁ x,
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) (FF x xx) yy
iscontr (hfiber (FF x) yy)

HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂

xx: D₁ x
i: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) (FF x xx) yy
iscontr (hfiber (FF x) yy)

D₂: disp_cat C₂

HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂

xx: D₁ x
i: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) (FF x xx) yy
isaprop (hfiber (FF x) yy)

D₂: disp_cat C₂

HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂

HFF₂: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
xx: D₁ x
i: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) (FF x xx) yy
hfiber (FF x) yy

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF₁: disp_functor_disp_ess_surj FF
HFF₂: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
xx: D₁ x
i: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) (FF x xx) yy
isaprop (hfiber (FF x) yy)
 exact (isaprop_hfiber_ff_disp HD₁ HD₂ HFF₂ x yy).
  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF₁: disp_functor_disp_ess_surj FF
HFF₂: disp_functor_ff FF

xx: D₁ x
i: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) (FF x xx) yy
hfiber (FF x) yy
 
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF₁: disp_functor_disp_ess_surj FF
HFF₂: disp_functor_ff FF
x: C₁
yy: D₂ (F x)
xx: D₁ x
i: z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x)) (FF x xx) yy
FF x xx = yy

    exact (isotoid_disp HD₂ (idpath _) i).
Qed.

(**
 2. Essentially surjective functors are split essentially surjective
 *)

C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
H₁: disp_functor_disp_ess_surj F
H₂: disp_functor_ff F
disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj F


C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
H₁: disp_functor_disp_ess_surj F
H₂: disp_functor_ff F
disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj F

  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
H₁: disp_functor_disp_ess_surj F
H₂: disp_functor_ff F
x: C
yy: D₂ (functor_identity C x)
∑ yy0 : D₁ x,
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (F x yy0) yy

  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
H₁: disp_functor_disp_ess_surj F
H₂: disp_functor_ff F
x: C
yy: D₂ (functor_identity C x)
isaprop
  (∑ xx : D₁ x,
   z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
     (F x xx) yy)

  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
H₁: disp_functor_disp_ess_surj F
H₂: disp_functor_ff F
x: C
yy: D₂ (functor_identity C x)
hfiber (F x) yy
≃ (∑ xx : D₁ x,
   z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
     (F x xx) yy)

  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
H₁: disp_functor_disp_ess_surj F
H₂: disp_functor_ff F
x: C
yy: D₂ (functor_identity C x)
∏ x0 : D₁ x,
(λ x1 : D₁ x, F x x1 = yy) x0
≃ (λ x1 : D₁ x,
   z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
     (F x x1) yy) x0

  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
H₁: disp_functor_disp_ess_surj F
H₂: disp_functor_ff F
x: C
yy: D₂ (functor_identity C x)
xx: D₁ x
F x xx = yy
≃ z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (F x xx) yy

  exact (make_weq _ (HD₂ x x (idpath _) _ _)).
Defined.

(**
 3. Being an equivalence is a proposition
 *)

C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: right_adjoint_over_id_data F
p₁: pr1 HF₁ = pr1 HF₂
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 HF₁) x xx ;; idtoiso_disp
                     (idpath
                        (functor_identity C x))
                     (maponpaths
                        (λ z : ∑
                               FF : disp_functor_data
                                      (functor_identity
                                         C) D₂ D₁,
                               disp_functor_axioms
                                 FF,
                         (pr11 z) x (F x xx)) p₁) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F (pr1 HF₂) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 HF₂) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 HF₁) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x) ((pr111 HF₁) x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x))
  (♯ F
     (idtoiso_disp
        (idpath (functor_identity C x))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : ∑
                  FF : disp_functor_data
                         (functor_identity C) D₂
                         D₁,
                  disp_functor_axioms FF,
            (pr11 z) x xx) p₁)) ;; (pr22 HF₂) x
                                     xx)
HF₁ = HF₂


C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: right_adjoint_over_id_data F
p₁: pr1 HF₁ = pr1 HF₂
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 HF₁) x xx ;; idtoiso_disp
                     (idpath
                        (functor_identity C x))
                     (maponpaths
                        (λ z : ∑
                               FF : disp_functor_data
                                      (functor_identity
                                         C) D₂ D₁,
                               disp_functor_axioms
                                 FF,
                         (pr11 z) x (F x xx)) p₁) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F (pr1 HF₂) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 HF₂) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 HF₁) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x) ((pr111 HF₁) x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x))
  (♯ F
     (idtoiso_disp
        (idpath (functor_identity C x))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : ∑
                  FF : disp_functor_data
                         (functor_identity C) D₂
                         D₁,
                  disp_functor_axioms FF,
            (pr11 z) x xx) p₁)) ;; (pr22 HF₂) x
                                     xx)
HF₁ = HF₂

  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
R₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
HF₂: right_adjoint_over_id_data F
p₁: pr1 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁) = pr1 HF₂
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx ;; idtoiso_disp
                                (idpath
                                   (functor_identity
                                      C x))
                                (maponpaths
                                   (λ z : ∑
                                          FF : disp_functor_data
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C)
                                                 D₂
                                                 D₁,
                                          disp_functor_axioms
                                            FF,
                                    (pr11 z) x
                                      (F x xx))
                                   p₁) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F (pr1 HF₂) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 HF₂) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x)
     ((pr111 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x))
  (♯ F
     (idtoiso_disp
        (idpath (functor_identity C x))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : ∑
                  FF : disp_functor_data
                         (functor_identity C) D₂
                         D₁,
                  disp_functor_axioms FF,
            (pr11 z) x xx) p₁)) ;; (pr22 HF₂) x
                                     xx)
R₁,, η₁,, ε₁ = HF₂

                                   p₁) =

  (♯ F
     (idtoiso_disp
        (idpath (functor_identity C x))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : ∑
                  FF : disp_functor_data
                         (functor_identity C) D₂
                         D₁,
                  disp_functor_axioms FF,
            (pr11 z) x xx) (idpath R₁))) ;; (pr22 
                                             (R₁,,
                                              η₂,,
                                              ε₂))
                                              x
                                              xx)
ε₁ = ε₂

  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
R₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
η₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx ;; idtoiso_disp
                                (idpath
                                   (functor_identity
                                      C x))
                                (maponpaths
                                   (λ z : ∑
                                          FF : disp_functor_data
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C)
                                                 D₂
                                                 D₁,
                                          disp_functor_axioms
                                            FF,
                                    (pr11 z) x
                                      (F x xx))
                                   (idpath R₁)) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F
        (pr1 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x)
     ((pr111 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x))
  (♯ F
     (idtoiso_disp
        (idpath (functor_identity C x))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : ∑
                  FF : disp_functor_data
                         (functor_identity C) D₂
                         D₁,
                  disp_functor_axioms FF,
            (pr11 z) x xx) (idpath R₁))) ;; (pr22 
                                             (R₁,,
                                              η₂,,
                                              ε₂))
                                              x
                                              xx)
η₁ = η₂

   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F
        (pr1 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)

                                              x

  (disp_functor_identity D₂)

  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))

  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)

  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx ;; idtoiso_disp
                                (idpath
                                   (functor_identity
                                      C x))
                                (maponpaths
                                   (λ z : ∑
                                          FF : disp_functor_data
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C)
                                                 D₂
                                                 D₁,

                                            FF,

                                      (F x xx))
                                   (idpath R₁)) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F
        (pr1 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x)
     ((pr111 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x))

     (idtoiso_disp
        (idpath (functor_identity C x))

           (λ z : ∑
                  FF : disp_functor_data
                         (functor_identity C) D₂
                         D₁,
                  disp_functor_axioms FF,

                                             (R₁,,
                                              η₂,,
                                              ε₂))
                                              x
                                              xx)
x: C
xx: D₁ x
q:= p₂ x xx: η₁ x xx ;; id_disp ((pr11 R₁) x (F x xx)) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] R₁ x (F x xx))
  (! id_right (identity x)) (η₂ x xx)
η₁ x xx = η₂ x xx

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
R₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)

  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
η₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx ;; idtoiso_disp
                                (idpath
                                   (functor_identity
                                      C x))
                                (maponpaths
                                   (λ z : ∑
                                          FF : disp_functor_data
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C)
                                                 D₂
                                                 D₁,
                                          disp_functor_axioms
                                            FF,
                                    (pr11 z) x
                                      (F x xx))
                                   (idpath R₁)) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F
        (pr1 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x)
     ((pr111 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x))
  (♯ F
     (idtoiso_disp
        (idpath (functor_identity C x))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : ∑
                  FF : disp_functor_data
                         (functor_identity C) D₂
                         D₁,
                  disp_functor_axioms FF,
            (pr11 z) x xx) (idpath R₁))) ;; (pr22 
                                             (R₁,,
                                              η₂,,
                                              ε₂))
                                              x
                                              xx)
x: C
xx: D₁ x
q: transportb (mor_disp xx (R₁ x (F x xx)))
  (id_right (identity x)) (η₁ x xx) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] R₁ x (F x xx))
  (! id_right (identity x)) (η₂ x xx)
η₁ x xx = η₂ x xx

        (pr1 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x)
     ((pr111 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x))
  (♯ F
     (idtoiso_disp
        (idpath (functor_identity C x))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : ∑
                  FF : disp_functor_data
                         (functor_identity C) D₂
                         D₁,
                  disp_functor_axioms FF,
            (pr11 z) x xx) (idpath R₁))) ;; (pr22 
                                             (R₁,,
                                              η₂,,
                                              ε₂))
                                              x
                                              xx)
x: C
xx: D₁ x
q: transportf (mor_disp xx (R₁ x (F x xx)))
  (! id_right (identity x)) (η₁ x xx) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] R₁ x (F x xx))
  (! id_right (identity x)) (η₂ x xx)
η₁ x xx =
transportb (mor_disp xx ((pr11 R₁) x (F x xx))) ?Goal1
  (transportf (mor_disp xx (R₁ x (F x xx)))
     (! id_right (identity x)) (η₁ x xx))
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
R₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
η₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx ;; idtoiso_disp
                                (idpath
                                   (functor_identity
                                      C x))
                                (maponpaths
                                   (λ z : ∑
                                          FF : disp_functor_data
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C)
                                                 D₂
                                                 D₁,
                                          disp_functor_axioms
                                            FF,
                                    (pr11 z) x
                                      (F x xx))
                                   (idpath R₁)) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F
        (pr1 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x)
     ((pr111 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x))
  (♯ F
     (idtoiso_disp
        (idpath (functor_identity C x))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : ∑
                  FF : disp_functor_data
                         (functor_identity C) D₂
                         D₁,
                  disp_functor_axioms FF,
            (pr11 z) x xx) (idpath R₁))) ;; (pr22 
                                             (R₁,,
                                              η₂,,
                                              ε₂))
                                              x
                                              xx)
x: C
xx: D₁ x
q: transportf (mor_disp xx (R₁ x (F x xx)))
  (! id_right (identity x)) (η₁ x xx) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] R₁ x (F x xx))
  (! id_right (identity x)) (η₂ x xx)
transportb (mor_disp xx ((pr11 R₁) x (F x xx))) ?Goal1
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] R₁ x (F x xx))
     (! id_right (identity x)) (η₂ x xx)) = η₂ x xx

(pr12 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx ;; idtoiso_disp
                                (idpath

                                      C x))

                                          FF : disp_functor_data
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C)
                                                 D₂

                                            FF,

                                   (idpath R₁)) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,

        (pr1 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)

(pr22 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx =

  (λ z : C

  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)

        (idpath (functor_identity C x))

  (! id_right (identity x)) (η₁ x xx) =

C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
R₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
η₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx ;; idtoiso_disp
                                (idpath
                                   (functor_identity
                                      C x))
                                (maponpaths
                                   (λ z : ∑
                                          FF : disp_functor_data
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C)
                                                 D₂
                                                 D₁,
                                          disp_functor_axioms
                                            FF,
                                    (pr11 z) x
                                      (F x xx))
                                   (idpath R₁)) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F
        (pr1 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x)
     ((pr111 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x))
  (♯ F
     (idtoiso_disp
        (idpath (functor_identity C x))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : ∑
                  FF : disp_functor_data
                         (functor_identity C) D₂
                         D₁,
                  disp_functor_axioms FF,
            (pr11 z) x xx) (idpath R₁))) ;; (pr22 
                                             (R₁,,
                                              η₂,,
                                              ε₂))
                                              x
                                              xx)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
ε₁ x xx = ε₂ x xx

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
R₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
η₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx ;; idtoiso_disp
                                (idpath
                                   (functor_identity
                                      C x))
                                (maponpaths
                                   (λ z : ∑
                                          FF : disp_functor_data
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C)
                                                 D₂
                                                 D₁,
                                          disp_functor_axioms
                                            FF,
                                    (pr11 z) x
                                      (F x xx))
                                   (idpath R₁)) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F
        (pr1 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x)
     ((pr111 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x))
  (♯ F
     (idtoiso_disp
        (idpath (functor_identity C x))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : ∑
                  FF : disp_functor_data
                         (functor_identity C) D₂
                         D₁,
                  disp_functor_axioms FF,
            (pr11 z) x xx) (idpath R₁))) ;; (pr22 
                                             (R₁,,
                                              η₂,,
                                              ε₂))
                                              x
                                              xx)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x ((pr11 R₁) x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (id_left (identity x))
  (♯ F (id_disp ((pr11 R₁) x xx)) ;; ε₂ x xx) =
ε₂ x xx

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
R₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
η₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx ;; idtoiso_disp
                                (idpath
                                   (functor_identity
                                      C x))
                                (maponpaths
                                   (λ z : ∑
                                          FF : disp_functor_data
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C)
                                                 D₂
                                                 D₁,
                                          disp_functor_axioms
                                            FF,
                                    (pr11 z) x
                                      (F x xx))
                                   (idpath R₁)) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F
        (pr1 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x)
     ((pr111 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x))
  (♯ F
     (idtoiso_disp
        (idpath (functor_identity C x))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : ∑
                  FF : disp_functor_data
                         (functor_identity C) D₂
                         D₁,
                  disp_functor_axioms FF,
            (pr11 z) x xx) (idpath R₁))) ;; (pr22 
                                             (R₁,,
                                              η₂,,
                                              ε₂))
                                              x
                                              xx)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x ((pr11 R₁) x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (id_left (identity x))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (F x ((pr11 R₁) x xx))
        (F x ((pr11 R₁) x xx)))
     (functor_id (functor_identity C) x)
     (id_disp (F x ((pr11 R₁) x xx))) ;; ε₂ x xx) =
ε₂ x xx

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
R₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
η₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx ;; idtoiso_disp
                                (idpath
                                   (functor_identity
                                      C x))
                                (maponpaths
                                   (λ z : ∑
                                          FF : disp_functor_data
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C)
                                                 D₂
                                                 D₁,
                                          disp_functor_axioms
                                            FF,
                                    (pr11 z) x
                                      (F x xx))
                                   (idpath R₁)) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F
        (pr1 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x)
     ((pr111 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x))
  (♯ F
     (idtoiso_disp
        (idpath (functor_identity C x))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : ∑
                  FF : disp_functor_data
                         (functor_identity C) D₂
                         D₁,
                  disp_functor_axioms FF,
            (pr11 z) x xx) (idpath R₁))) ;; (pr22 
                                             (R₁,,
                                              η₂,,
                                              ε₂))
                                              x
                                              xx)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x ((pr11 R₁) x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (id_left (identity x))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (F x ((pr11 R₁) x xx))
        (F x ((pr11 R₁) x xx)))
     (! functor_id (functor_identity C) x)
     (id_disp (F x ((pr11 R₁) x xx))) ;; ε₂ x xx) =
ε₂ x xx

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
R₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
η₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx ;; idtoiso_disp
                                (idpath
                                   (functor_identity
                                      C x))
                                (maponpaths
                                   (λ z : ∑
                                          FF : disp_functor_data
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C)
                                                 D₂
                                                 D₁,
                                          disp_functor_axioms
                                            FF,
                                    (pr11 z) x
                                      (F x xx))
                                   (idpath R₁)) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F
        (pr1 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x)
     ((pr111 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x))
  (♯ F
     (idtoiso_disp
        (idpath (functor_identity C x))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : ∑
                  FF : disp_functor_data
                         (functor_identity C) D₂
                         D₁,
                  disp_functor_axioms FF,
            (pr11 z) x xx) (idpath R₁))) ;; (pr22 
                                             (R₁,,
                                              η₂,,
                                              ε₂))
                                              x
                                              xx)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x ((pr11 R₁) x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (id_left (identity x))
  (transportf (mor_disp (F x ((pr11 R₁) x xx)) xx)
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (identity (functor_identity C x)) (identity x)
        (identity x)
        (! functor_id (functor_identity C) x))
     (id_disp (F x ((pr11 R₁) x xx)) ;; ε₂ x xx)) =
ε₂ x xx

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
R₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
η₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx ;; idtoiso_disp
                                (idpath
                                   (functor_identity
                                      C x))
                                (maponpaths
                                   (λ z : ∑
                                          FF : disp_functor_data
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C)
                                                 D₂
                                                 D₁,
                                          disp_functor_axioms
                                            FF,
                                    (pr11 z) x
                                      (F x xx))
                                   (idpath R₁)) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F
        (pr1 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x)
     ((pr111 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x))
  (♯ F
     (idtoiso_disp
        (idpath (functor_identity C x))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : ∑
                  FF : disp_functor_data
                         (functor_identity C) D₂
                         D₁,
                  disp_functor_axioms FF,
            (pr11 z) x xx) (idpath R₁))) ;; (pr22 
                                             (R₁,,
                                              η₂,,
                                              ε₂))
                                              x
                                              xx)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x ((pr11 R₁) x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (functor_identity C x)) (identity x)
     (identity x)
     (! functor_id (functor_identity C) x) @
   id_left (identity x))
  (id_disp (F x ((pr11 R₁) x xx)) ;; ε₂ x xx) =
ε₂ x xx

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
R₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
η₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx ;; idtoiso_disp
                                (idpath
                                   (functor_identity
                                      C x))
                                (maponpaths
                                   (λ z : ∑
                                          FF : disp_functor_data
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C)
                                                 D₂
                                                 D₁,
                                          disp_functor_axioms
                                            FF,
                                    (pr11 z) x
                                      (F x xx))
                                   (idpath R₁)) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F
        (pr1 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x)
     ((pr111 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x))
  (♯ F
     (idtoiso_disp
        (idpath (functor_identity C x))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : ∑
                  FF : disp_functor_data
                         (functor_identity C) D₂
                         D₁,
                  disp_functor_axioms FF,
            (pr11 z) x xx) (idpath R₁))) ;; (pr22 
                                             (R₁,,
                                              η₂,,
                                              ε₂))
                                              x
                                              xx)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x ((pr11 R₁) x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (functor_identity C x)) (identity x)
     (identity x)
     (! functor_id (functor_identity C) x) @
   id_left (identity x))
  (transportb (mor_disp (F x ((pr11 R₁) x xx)) xx)
     (id_left (identity x)) (ε₂ x xx)) = ε₂ x xx

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
R₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
η₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx ;; idtoiso_disp
                                (idpath
                                   (functor_identity
                                      C x))
                                (maponpaths
                                   (λ z : ∑
                                          FF : disp_functor_data
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C)
                                                 D₂
                                                 D₁,
                                          disp_functor_axioms
                                            FF,
                                    (pr11 z) x
                                      (F x xx))
                                   (idpath R₁)) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F
        (pr1 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x)
     ((pr111 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x))
  (♯ F
     (idtoiso_disp
        (idpath (functor_identity C x))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : ∑
                  FF : disp_functor_data
                         (functor_identity C) D₂
                         D₁,
                  disp_functor_axioms FF,
            (pr11 z) x xx) (idpath R₁))) ;; (pr22 
                                             (R₁,,
                                              η₂,,
                                              ε₂))
                                              x
                                              xx)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x ((pr11 R₁) x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (functor_identity C x)) (identity x)
     (identity x)
     (! functor_id (functor_identity C) x) @
   id_left (identity x))
  (transportf (mor_disp (F x ((pr11 R₁) x xx)) xx)
     (! id_left (identity x)) (ε₂ x xx)) = ε₂ x xx

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
R₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
η₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx ;; idtoiso_disp
                                (idpath
                                   (functor_identity
                                      C x))
                                (maponpaths
                                   (λ z : ∑
                                          FF : disp_functor_data
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C)
                                                 D₂
                                                 D₁,
                                          disp_functor_axioms
                                            FF,
                                    (pr11 z) x
                                      (F x xx))
                                   (idpath R₁)) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F
        (pr1 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x)
     ((pr111 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x))
  (♯ F
     (idtoiso_disp
        (idpath (functor_identity C x))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : ∑
                  FF : disp_functor_data
                         (functor_identity C) D₂
                         D₁,
                  disp_functor_axioms FF,
            (pr11 z) x xx) (idpath R₁))) ;; (pr22 
                                             (R₁,,
                                              η₂,,
                                              ε₂))
                                              x
                                              xx)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x ((pr11 R₁) x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (! id_left (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (functor_identity C x)) (identity x)
     (identity x)
     (! functor_id (functor_identity C) x) @
   id_left (identity x)) (ε₂ x xx) = ε₂ x xx

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
R₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
η₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx ;; idtoiso_disp
                                (idpath
                                   (functor_identity
                                      C x))
                                (maponpaths
                                   (λ z : ∑
                                          FF : disp_functor_data
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C)
                                                 D₂
                                                 D₁,
                                          disp_functor_axioms
                                            FF,
                                    (pr11 z) x
                                      (F x xx))
                                   (idpath R₁)) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F
        (pr1 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 (R₁,, η₂,, ε₂)) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x)
     ((pr111 (R₁,, η₁,, ε₁)) x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x))
  (♯ F
     (idtoiso_disp
        (idpath (functor_identity C x))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : ∑
                  FF : disp_functor_data
                         (functor_identity C) D₂
                         D₁,
                  disp_functor_axioms FF,
            (pr11 z) x xx) (idpath R₁))) ;; (pr22 
                                             (R₁,,
                                              η₂,,
                                              ε₂))
                                              x
                                              xx)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
isaset (C ⟦ x, x ⟧)

    apply homset_property.
Qed.


C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: right_adjoint_over_id_data F
p₁: disp_nat_z_iso (pr1 HF₁) (pr1 HF₂)
  (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C))
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 HF₁) x xx ;; p₁ x (F x xx) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F (pr1 HF₂) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 HF₂) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 HF₁) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x) (pr1 HF₁ x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x)) (♯ F (p₁ x xx) ;; (pr22 HF₂) x xx)
HF₁ = HF₂


C: category

HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂

  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,

  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x)) (♯ F (p₁ x xx) ;; (pr22 HF₂) x xx)
HF₁ = HF₂

HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂

  (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C))

(pr12 HF₁) x xx ;; p₁ x (F x xx) =

  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F (pr1 HF₂) x xx)

transportf
  (λ z : C
