        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x)) (♯ F (p₁ x xx) ;; (pr22 HF₂) x xx)
pr1 HF₁ = pr1 HF₂
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: right_adjoint_over_id_data F
p₁: disp_nat_z_iso (pr1 HF₁) (pr1 HF₂)
  (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C))
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 HF₁) x xx ;; p₁ x (F x xx) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F (pr1 HF₂) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 HF₂) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 HF₁) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x) (pr1 HF₁ x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x)) (♯ F (p₁ x xx) ;; (pr22 HF₂) x xx)
∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 HF₁) x xx ;; idtoiso_disp
                     (idpath (functor_identity C x))
                     (maponpaths
                        (λ z : ∑
                               FF : disp_functor_data
                                      (functor_identity
                                         C) D₂ D₁,
                               disp_functor_axioms FF,
                         (pr11 z) x (F x xx)) ?p₁) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F (pr1 HF₂) x xx)
  (! id_right (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 HF₂) x xx)
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: right_adjoint_over_id_data F
p₁: disp_nat_z_iso (pr1 HF₁) (pr1 HF₂)
  (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C))
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 HF₁) x xx ;; p₁ x (F x xx) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F (pr1 HF₂) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 HF₂) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 HF₁) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x) (pr1 HF₁ x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x)) (♯ F (p₁ x xx) ;; (pr22 HF₂) x xx)
∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 HF₁) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x) ((pr111 HF₁) x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) x))
  (♯ F
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity C x))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : ∑
                  FF : disp_functor_data
                         (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁,
                  disp_functor_axioms FF,
            (pr11 z) x xx) ?p₁)) ;; (pr22 HF₂) x xx)

  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: right_adjoint_over_id_data F
p₁: disp_nat_z_iso (pr1 HF₁) (pr1 HF₂)
  (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C))
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 HF₁) x xx ;; p₁ x (F x xx) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F (pr1 HF₂) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 HF₂) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 HF₁) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x) (pr1 HF₁ x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x)) (♯ F (p₁ x xx) ;; (pr22 HF₂) x xx)
pr1 HF₁ = pr1 HF₂
 exact (invmap (disp_functor_eq_weq _ _ HD₁) p₁).
  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: right_adjoint_over_id_data F
p₁: disp_nat_z_iso (pr1 HF₁) (pr1 HF₂)
  (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C))
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 HF₁) x xx ;; p₁ x (F x xx) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F (pr1 HF₂) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 HF₂) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 HF₁) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x) (pr1 HF₁ x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x)) (♯ F (p₁ x xx) ;; (pr22 HF₂) x xx)
∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 HF₁) x xx ;; idtoiso_disp
                     (idpath (functor_identity C x))
                     (maponpaths
                        (λ z : ∑
                               FF : disp_functor_data
                                      (functor_identity
                                         C) D₂ D₁,
                               disp_functor_axioms FF,
                         (pr11 z) x (F x xx))
                        (invmap
                           (disp_functor_eq_weq
                              (pr1 HF₁) (pr1 HF₂) HD₁)
                           p₁)) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F (pr1 HF₂) x xx)
  (! id_right (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 HF₂) x xx)

  (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C))

  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,

   z] disp_functor_composite F (pr1 HF₂) x xx)

xx: D₁ x
(pr12 HF₁) x xx ;; idtoiso_disp
                     (idpath (functor_identity C x))
                     (maponpaths
                        (λ z : ∑
                               FF : disp_functor_data
                                      (functor_identity
                                         C) D₂ D₁,
                               disp_functor_axioms FF,
                         (pr11 z) x (F x xx))
                        (invmap
                           (disp_functor_eq_weq
                              (pr1 HF₁) (pr1 HF₂) HD₁)
                           p₁)) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F (pr1 HF₂) x xx)
  (! id_right (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 HF₂) x xx)

x: C
xx: D₁ x
(pr12 HF₁) x xx ;; idtoiso_disp
                     (idpath (functor_identity C x))
                     (maponpaths
                        (λ z : ∑
                               FF : disp_functor_data
                                      (functor_identity
                                         C) D₂ D₁,
                               disp_functor_axioms FF,
                         (pr11 z) x (F x xx))
                        (invmap
                           (disp_functor_eq_weq
                              (pr1 HF₁) (pr1 HF₂) HD₁)
                           p₁)) =
(pr12 HF₁) x xx ;; p₁ x (F x xx)

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: right_adjoint_over_id_data F
p₁: disp_nat_z_iso (pr1 HF₁) (pr1 HF₂)
  (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C))
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 HF₁) x xx ;; p₁ x (F x xx) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F (pr1 HF₂) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 HF₂) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 HF₁) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x) (pr1 HF₁ x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x)) (♯ F (p₁ x xx) ;; (pr22 HF₂) x xx)
x: C
xx: D₁ x
idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity C x))
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : ∑
            FF : disp_functor_data
                   (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁,
            disp_functor_axioms FF,
      (pr11 z) x (F x xx))
     (invmap
        (disp_functor_eq_weq (pr1 HF₁) (pr1 HF₂) HD₁)
        p₁)) = p₁ x (F x xx)

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: right_adjoint_over_id_data F
p₁: disp_nat_z_iso (pr1 HF₁) (pr1 HF₂)
  (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C))
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 HF₁) x xx ;; p₁ x (F x xx) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F (pr1 HF₂) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 HF₂) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 HF₁) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x) (pr1 HF₁ x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x)) (♯ F (p₁ x xx) ;; (pr22 HF₂) x xx)
x: C
xx: D₁ x
idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity C x))
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : ∑
            FF : disp_functor_data
                   (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁,
            disp_functor_axioms FF,
      (pr11 z) x (F x xx))
     (invmap
        (disp_functor_eq_weq (pr1 HF₁) (pr1 HF₂) HD₁)
        p₁)) =
(pr11 (disp_functor_eq_weq (pr1 HF₁) (pr1 HF₂) HD₁
         (invmap
            (disp_functor_eq_weq (pr1 HF₁) (pr1 HF₂)
               HD₁) p₁))) x (F x xx)

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: right_adjoint_over_id_data F
p₁: disp_nat_z_iso (pr1 HF₁) (pr1 HF₂)
  (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C))
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 HF₁) x xx ;; p₁ x (F x xx) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F (pr1 HF₂) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 HF₂) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 HF₁) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x) (pr1 HF₁ x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x)) (♯ F (p₁ x xx) ;; (pr22 HF₂) x xx)
x: C
xx: D₁ x
∏ p : pr1 HF₁ = pr1 HF₂,
idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity C x))
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : ∑
            FF : disp_functor_data
                   (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁,
            disp_functor_axioms FF,
      (pr11 z) x (F x xx)) p) =
(pr11 (disp_functor_eq_weq (pr1 HF₁) (pr1 HF₂) HD₁ p))
  x (F x xx)

(pr12 HF₁) x xx ;; p₁ x (F x xx) =

  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,

  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C

        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x)) (♯ F (p₁ x xx) ;; (pr22 HF₂) x xx)
x: C
xx: D₁ x
p: pr1 HF₁ = pr1 HF₂
idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity C x))
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : ∑
            FF : disp_functor_data
                   (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁,
            disp_functor_axioms FF,

  x (F x xx)

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: right_adjoint_over_id_data F
p₁: disp_nat_z_iso (pr1 HF₁) (pr1 HF₂)
  (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C))
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 HF₁) x xx ;; p₁ x (F x xx) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F (pr1 HF₂) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 HF₂) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 HF₁) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x) (pr1 HF₁ x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x)) (♯ F (p₁ x xx) ;; (pr22 HF₂) x xx)
x: C
xx: D₁ x
id_disp ((pr111 HF₁) x (F x xx)) =
id_disp ((pr111 HF₁) x (F x xx))

    apply idpath.
  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: right_adjoint_over_id_data F
p₁: disp_nat_z_iso (pr1 HF₁) (pr1 HF₂)
  (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C))
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 HF₁) x xx ;; p₁ x (F x xx) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F (pr1 HF₂) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 HF₂) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 HF₁) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x) (pr1 HF₁ x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x)) (♯ F (p₁ x xx) ;; (pr22 HF₂) x xx)
∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 HF₁) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x) ((pr111 HF₁) x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) x))
  (♯ F
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity C x))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : ∑
                  FF : disp_functor_data
                         (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁,
                  disp_functor_axioms FF,
            (pr11 z) x xx)
           (invmap
              (disp_functor_eq_weq (pr1 HF₁) (pr1 HF₂)
                 HD₁) p₁))) ;; (pr22 HF₂) x xx)
 
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: right_adjoint_over_id_data F
p₁: disp_nat_z_iso (pr1 HF₁) (pr1 HF₂)
  (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C))
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 HF₁) x xx ;; p₁ x (F x xx) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F (pr1 HF₂) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 HF₂) x xx)

(pr22 HF₁) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x) (pr1 HF₁ x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x)) (♯ F (p₁ x xx) ;; (pr22 HF₂) x xx)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
(pr22 HF₁) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x) ((pr111 HF₁) x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) x))
  (♯ F
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity C x))
        (maponpaths
           (λ z : ∑
                  FF : disp_functor_data
                         (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁,
                  disp_functor_axioms FF,
            (pr11 z) x xx)
           (invmap
              (disp_functor_eq_weq (pr1 HF₁) (pr1 HF₂)
                 HD₁) p₁))) ;; (pr22 HF₂) x xx)

xx: D₂ x

  (idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity C x))
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : ∑
               FF : disp_functor_data
                      (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁,

  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,

   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F (pr1 HF₂) x xx)
  (! id_right

  (λ z : C

   F (functor_identity C x) (pr1 HF₁ x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x)) (♯ F (p₁ x xx) ;; (pr22 HF₂) x xx)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity C x))
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : ∑
            FF : disp_functor_data
                   (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁,
            disp_functor_axioms FF, (pr11 z) x xx)
     (invmap
        (disp_functor_eq_weq (pr1 HF₁) (pr1 HF₂) HD₁)
        p₁)) = p₁ x xx

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: right_adjoint_over_id_data F
p₁: disp_nat_z_iso (pr1 HF₁) (pr1 HF₂)
  (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C))
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 HF₁) x xx ;; p₁ x (F x xx) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F (pr1 HF₂) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 HF₂) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 HF₁) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x) (pr1 HF₁ x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x)) (♯ F (p₁ x xx) ;; (pr22 HF₂) x xx)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity C x))
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : ∑
            FF : disp_functor_data
                   (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁,
            disp_functor_axioms FF, (pr11 z) x xx)
     (invmap
        (disp_functor_eq_weq (pr1 HF₁) (pr1 HF₂) HD₁)
        p₁)) =
(pr11 (disp_functor_eq_weq (pr1 HF₁) (pr1 HF₂) HD₁
         (invmap
            (disp_functor_eq_weq (pr1 HF₁) (pr1 HF₂)
               HD₁) p₁))) x xx

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: right_adjoint_over_id_data F
p₁: disp_nat_z_iso (pr1 HF₁) (pr1 HF₂)
  (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C))
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 HF₁) x xx ;; p₁ x (F x xx) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F (pr1 HF₂) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 HF₂) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 HF₁) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x) (pr1 HF₁ x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x)) (♯ F (p₁ x xx) ;; (pr22 HF₂) x xx)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
∏ p : pr1 HF₁ = pr1 HF₂,
idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity C x))
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : ∑
            FF : disp_functor_data
                   (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁,
            disp_functor_axioms FF, (pr11 z) x xx) p) =
(pr11 (disp_functor_eq_weq (pr1 HF₁) (pr1 HF₂) HD₁ p))
  x xx

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: right_adjoint_over_id_data F
p₁: disp_nat_z_iso (pr1 HF₁) (pr1 HF₂)
  (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C))
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 HF₁) x xx ;; p₁ x (F x xx) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F (pr1 HF₂) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 HF₂) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 HF₁) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x) (pr1 HF₁ x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x)) (♯ F (p₁ x xx) ;; (pr22 HF₂) x xx)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
p: pr1 HF₁ = pr1 HF₂
idtoiso_disp (idpath (functor_identity C x))
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : ∑
            FF : disp_functor_data
                   (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁,
            disp_functor_axioms FF, (pr11 z) x xx) p) =
(pr11 (disp_functor_eq_weq (pr1 HF₁) (pr1 HF₂) HD₁ p))
  x xx

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: right_adjoint_over_id_data F
p₁: disp_nat_z_iso (pr1 HF₁) (pr1 HF₂)
  (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C))
p₂: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr12 HF₁) x xx ;; p₁ x (F x xx) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F (pr1 HF₂) x xx)
  (! id_right
       (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr12 HF₂) x xx)
p₃: ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr22 HF₁) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C
             (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
           x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x) (pr1 HF₁ x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
        x)) (♯ F (p₁ x xx) ;; (pr22 HF₂) x xx)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
id_disp ((pr111 HF₁) x xx) =
id_disp ((pr111 HF₁) x xx)

    apply idpath.
Qed.

Section IsEquivOverIdIsProp.
  Context {C : category}
          {D₁ D₂ : disp_cat C}
          (HD₁ : is_univalent_disp D₁)
          (HD₂ : is_univalent_disp D₂)
          (F : disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂).

  Section Defs.
    Context (HF₁ HF₂ : is_equiv_over_id F).

    Let R₁ : disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁ := HF₁.
    Let η₁ : disp_nat_trans
              (nat_trans_id _)
              (disp_functor_identity _)
              (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
      := unit_over_id HF₁.
    Let ε₁ : disp_nat_trans
               (nat_trans_id _)
               (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
               (disp_functor_identity _)
      := counit_over_id HF₁.

    Let R₂ : disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁ := HF₂.
    Let η₂ : disp_nat_trans
              (nat_trans_id _)
              (disp_functor_identity _)
              (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
      := unit_over_id HF₂.
    Let ε₂ : disp_nat_trans
              (nat_trans_id _)
              (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
              (disp_functor_identity _)
      := counit_over_id HF₂.

    Definition isaprop_is_equiv_over_id_nat_trans
      : disp_nat_trans (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C)) R₁ R₂
      := disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp
           (disp_nat_trans_over_id_prewhisker R₁ η₂)
           (disp_nat_trans_over_id_postwhisker R₂ ε₁).

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
is_disp_nat_z_iso (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C))
  isaprop_is_equiv_over_id_nat_trans

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
is_disp_nat_z_iso (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C))
  isaprop_is_equiv_over_id_nat_trans

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
is_z_iso_disp
  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
     (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C)) x)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, R₁ x xx -->[ z] R₂ x xx)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
     (η₂ x (R₁ x xx) ;; ♯ R₂ (ε₁ x xx)))

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
m:= η₂ x (R₁ x xx) ;; ♯ R₂ (ε₁ x xx): disp_functor_identity D₁ x (R₁ x xx) -->[
nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x
· (# (functor_identity C))%cat
    (nat_trans_id
       (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) x)] 
R₂ ((functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) x)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
is_z_iso_disp
  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
     (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C)) x)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, R₁ x xx -->[ z] R₂ x xx)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
     (η₂ x (R₁ x xx) ;; ♯ R₂ (ε₁ x xx)))

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
m:= η₂ x (R₁ x xx) ;; ♯ R₂ (ε₁ x xx): R₁ x xx -->[ identity x · identity x] R₂ x xx
is_z_iso_disp
  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
     (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C)) x)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, R₁ x xx -->[ z] R₂ x xx)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
     (η₂ x (R₁ x xx) ;; ♯ R₂ (ε₁ x xx)))

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
m:= η₂ x (R₁ x xx) ;; ♯ R₂ (ε₁ x xx): R₁ x xx -->[ identity x · identity x] R₂ x xx
is_z_iso_disp
  (z_iso_comp (identity_z_iso x) (identity_z_iso x))
  (η₂ x (R₁ x xx) ;; ♯ R₂ (ε₁ x xx))

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
m:= η₂ x (R₁ x xx) ;; ♯ R₂ (ε₁ x xx): R₁ x xx -->[ identity x · identity x] R₂ x xx
(λ ff : R₁ x xx -->[
        identity_z_iso x] R₂ x (F x (R₁ x xx)),
 is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) ff)
  (pr1 η₂ x (R₁ x xx))
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
m:= η₂ x (R₁ x xx) ;; ♯ R₂ (ε₁ x xx): R₁ x xx -->[ identity x · identity x] R₂ x xx
(λ ff : R₂ x (F x (R₁ x xx)) -->[
        identity_z_iso x] R₂ x xx,
 is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) ff)
  (pr2 R₂ x x (F x (R₁ x xx)) xx (identity x)
     (ε₁ x xx))

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
m:= η₂ x (R₁ x xx) ;; ♯ R₂ (ε₁ x xx): R₁ x xx -->[ identity x · identity x] R₂ x xx
(λ ff : R₁ x xx -->[
        identity_z_iso x] R₂ x (F x (R₁ x xx)),
 is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) ff)
  (pr1 η₂ x (R₁ x xx))
 apply HF₂.
      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
m:= η₂ x (R₁ x xx) ;; ♯ R₂ (ε₁ x xx): R₁ x xx -->[ identity x · identity x] R₂ x xx
(λ ff : R₂ x (F x (R₁ x xx)) -->[
        identity_z_iso x] R₂ x xx,
 is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) ff)
  (pr2 R₂ x x (F x (R₁ x xx)) xx (identity x)
     (ε₁ x xx))
 exact (is_z_iso_disp_independent_of_is_z_iso
                 _ _
                 (pr2 (disp_functor_on_z_iso_disp
                         R₂
                         (make_z_iso_disp _ (is_z_iso_counit_over_id HF₁ x xx))))).
    Defined.

    Definition isaprop_is_equiv_over_id_nat_z_iso
      : disp_nat_z_iso R₁ R₂ (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C))
      := isaprop_is_equiv_over_id_nat_trans
         ,,
         isaprop_is_equiv_over_id_is_nat_z_iso.

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₁ x
η₁ x xx ;; isaprop_is_equiv_over_id_nat_z_iso x
             (F x xx) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F R₂ x xx)
  (! id_right (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  (η₂ x xx)

  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₁ x
η₁ x xx ;; transportf
             (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              R₁ x (F x xx) -->[ z] R₂ x (F x xx))
             (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
                x)
             (η₂ x (R₁ x (F x xx)) ;; ♯ R₂
                                        (ε₁ x (F x xx))) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] R₂ x (F x xx))
  (! id_right (identity x)) (η₂ x xx)

η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans

     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₁ x
transportf (mor_disp xx (R₂ x (F x xx)))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))
  (η₁ x xx ;; (η₂ x (R₁ x (F x xx)) ;; ♯ R₂
                                         (ε₁ x
                                            (F x xx)))) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] R₂ x (F x xx))
  (! id_right (identity x)) (η₂ x xx)

     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))
  (transportb (mor_disp xx (R₂ x (F x xx)))
     (assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x))
     (η₁ x xx ;; η₂ x (R₁ x (F x xx)) ;; ♯ R₂
                                           (ε₁ x
                                              (F x xx)))) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] R₂ x (F x xx))

R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₁ x
transportf (mor_disp xx (R₂ x (F x xx)))
  (! assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx)
        (disp_functor_composite F R₂ x (R₁ x (F x xx))))
     (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
        x x ((pr12 C) x))
     (η₂ x xx ;; ♯ (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
                   (pr1 η₁ x xx)) ;; ♯ R₂
                                       (ε₁ x (F x xx))) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] R₂ x (F x xx))
  (! id_right (identity x)) (η₂ x xx)

        (disp_functor_composite F R₂ x (R₁ x (F x xx))))
     (! nat_trans_ax
          (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C)) x x

                   (pr1 η₁ x xx)) ;; ♯ R₂

  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₁ x

  (! assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp xx (R₂ x (F x (R₁ x (F x xx)))))
     (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x x
          ((pr12 C) x))
     (η₂ x xx ;; ♯ R₂ (♯ F (pr1 η₁ x xx))) ;; ♯ R₂
                                                (ε₁ x
                                                 (F x
                                                 xx))) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] R₂ x (F x xx))
  (! id_right (identity x)) (η₂ x xx)

   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx (R₂ x (F x xx)))
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity x · (pr12 C) x)
        (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
        (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x

xx: D₁ x
♯ R₂ (♯ F (pr1 η₁ x xx)) ;; ♯ R₂ (ε₁ x (F x xx)) = ?t2

        
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂

  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₁ x
?t2 = ♯ R₂ (♯ F (pr1 η₁ x xx)) ;; ♯ R₂ (ε₁ x (F x xx))

        apply (disp_functor_comp_var R₂).
      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₁ x
transportf (mor_disp xx (R₂ x (F x xx)))
  (assoc (identity x) ((pr12 C) x) (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x · (pr12 C) x)
     (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
     (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x x
          ((pr12 C) x)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))
  (η₂ x xx ;; transportf
                (mor_disp (R₂ x (F x xx))
                   (R₂ x (F x xx)))
                (functor_comp (functor_identity C)
                   ((pr12 C) x) ((pr12 C) x))
                (♯ R₂
                   (♯ F (pr1 η₁ x xx) ;; ε₁ x (F x xx)))) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] R₂ x (F x xx))
  (! id_right (identity x)) (η₂ x xx)

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₁ x
transportf (mor_disp xx (R₂ x (F x xx)))
  (assoc (identity x) ((pr12 C) x) (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x · (pr12 C) x)
     (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
     (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x x
          ((pr12 C) x)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx (R₂ x (F x xx)))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (functor_comp (functor_identity C)
           ((pr12 C) x) ((pr12 C) x)))
     (η₂ x xx ;; ♯ R₂
                   (♯ F (pr1 η₁ x xx) ;; ε₁ x (F x xx)))) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] R₂ x (F x xx))
  (! id_right (identity x)) (η₂ x xx)

xx: D₁ x
♯ F (pr1 η₁ x xx) ;; ε₁ x (F x xx) = ?t2

        exact (triangle_1_over_id HF₁ x xx).
      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂

  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)

η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)

  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₁ x
transportf (mor_disp xx (R₂ x (F x xx)))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C) ((pr12 C) x)
        ((pr12 C) x)) @
   assoc (identity x) ((pr12 C) x) (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x · (pr12 C) x)
     (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
     (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x x
          ((pr12 C) x)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))
  (η₂ x xx ;; ♯ R₂
                (transportb
                   (mor_disp
                      (pr1 HF₁ (functor_identity C x)
                         (disp_functor_identity D₁ x
                            xx))
                      (pr1 HF₁ (functor_identity C x)
                         (disp_functor_identity D₁ x
                            xx)))
                   (id_left
                      (identity
                         (functor_identity C
                            (functor_identity C x))))
                   (id_disp
                      (pr1 HF₁ (functor_identity C x)
                         (disp_functor_identity D₁ x
                            xx))))) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] R₂ x (F x xx))
  (! id_right (identity x)) (η₂ x xx)

                         (disp_functor_identity D₁ x
                            xx))))) =
transportf

  (disp_functor_identity D₂)

  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))

  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (mor_disp xx
     (R₂ (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x))
        (pr1 HF₁ (functor_identity C x)
           (disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx))))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (! id_left
             (identity
                (functor_identity C
                   (functor_identity C x))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C) ((pr12 C) x)
        ((pr12 C) x)) @
   assoc (identity x) ((pr12 C) x) (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x · (pr12 C) x)
     (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
     (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x x
          ((pr12 C) x)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))
  (η₂ x xx ;; ♯ R₂
                (id_disp
                   (pr1 HF₁ (functor_identity C x)
                      (disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx)))) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] R₂ x (F x xx))
  (! id_right (identity x)) (η₂ x xx)

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (mor_disp xx
     (R₂ (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x))
        (pr1 HF₁ (functor_identity C x)
           (disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx))))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (! id_left
             (identity
                (functor_identity C
                   (functor_identity C x))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C) ((pr12 C) x)
        ((pr12 C) x)) @
   assoc (identity x) ((pr12 C) x) (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x · (pr12 C) x)
     (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
     (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x x
          ((pr12 C) x)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))
  (η₂ x xx ;; transportb
                (mor_disp
                   (R₂
                      (functor_identity C
                         (functor_identity C x))
                      (pr1 HF₁ (functor_identity C x)
                         (disp_functor_identity D₁ x
                            xx)))
                   (R₂
                      (functor_identity C
                         (functor_identity C x))
                      (pr1 HF₁ (functor_identity C x)
                         (disp_functor_identity D₁ x
                            xx))))
                (functor_id (functor_identity C)
                   (functor_identity C
                      (functor_identity C x)))
                (id_disp
                   (R₂
                      (functor_identity C
                         (functor_identity C x))
                      (pr1 HF₁ (functor_identity C x)
                         (disp_functor_identity D₁ x
                            xx))))) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] R₂ x (F x xx))
  (! id_right (identity x)) (η₂ x xx)

  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)

  (disp_functor_identity D₂)

  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))

  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (mor_disp xx
     (R₂ (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x))
        (pr1 HF₁ (functor_identity C x)
           (disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx))))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (! id_left
             (identity
                (functor_identity C
                   (functor_identity C x))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C) ((pr12 C) x)
        ((pr12 C) x)) @
   assoc (identity x) ((pr12 C) x) (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x · (pr12 C) x)
     (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
     (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x x
          ((pr12 C) x)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))
  (η₂ x xx ;; transportf
                (mor_disp
                   (R₂
                      (functor_identity C
                         (functor_identity C x))
                      (pr1 HF₁ (functor_identity C x)
                         (disp_functor_identity D₁ x
                            xx)))
                   (R₂
                      (functor_identity C
                         (functor_identity C x))
                      (pr1 HF₁ (functor_identity C x)
                         (disp_functor_identity D₁ x
                            xx))))
                (! functor_id (functor_identity C)
                     (functor_identity C
                        (functor_identity C x)))
                (id_disp
                   (R₂
                      (functor_identity C
                         (functor_identity C x))
                      (pr1 HF₁ (functor_identity C x)
                         (disp_functor_identity D₁ x
                            xx))))) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] R₂ x (F x xx))
  (! id_right (identity x)) (η₂ x xx)

D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)

  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (mor_disp xx
     (R₂ (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x))
        (pr1 HF₁ (functor_identity C x)
           (disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx))))
  (! id_right (identity x) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (! functor_id (functor_identity C)
          (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (! id_left
             (identity
                (functor_identity C
                   (functor_identity C x))))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C) ((pr12 C) x)
        ((pr12 C) x)) @
   assoc (identity x) ((pr12 C) x) (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x · (pr12 C) x)
     (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
     (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x x
          ((pr12 C) x)) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))
  (η₂ x xx) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ z] R₂ x (F x xx))
  (! id_right (identity x)) (η₂ x xx)

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₁ x
! id_right (identity x) @
maponpaths (compose (identity x))
  (! functor_id (functor_identity C)
       (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x))) @
maponpaths (compose (identity x))
  (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
     (! id_left
          (identity
             (functor_identity C
                (functor_identity C x))))) @
maponpaths (compose (identity x))
  (functor_comp (functor_identity C) ((pr12 C) x)
     ((pr12 C) x)) @
assoc (identity x) ((pr12 C) x) (identity x) @
cancel_postcomposition (identity x · (pr12 C) x)
  (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x x
       ((pr12 C) x)) @
! assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
maponpaths (compose (identity x))
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) =
! id_right (identity x)

      apply homset_property.
    Qed.

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
ε₁ x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x) (R₁ x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) x))
  (♯ F (isaprop_is_equiv_over_id_nat_z_iso x xx) ;; 
   ε₂ x xx)

D₁, D₂: disp_cat C

HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂

  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))

  (nat_trans_id

  (disp_functor_identity D₂)

  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))

  (nat_trans_id

  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)

xx: D₂ x
ε₁ x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x) (R₁ x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left

        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) x))
  (♯ F (isaprop_is_equiv_over_id_nat_z_iso x xx) ;; 
   ε₂ x xx)

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
ε₁ x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x (R₁ x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (id_left (identity x))
  (♯ F
     (transportf
        (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, R₁ x xx -->[ z] R₂ x xx)
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
        (η₂ x (R₁ x xx) ;; ♯ R₂ (ε₁ x xx))) ;; ε₂ x xx)

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
ε₁ x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x (R₁ x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (id_left (identity x))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (F x (R₁ x xx)) (F x (R₂ x xx)))
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))
     (♯ F (η₂ x (R₁ x xx) ;; ♯ R₂ (ε₁ x xx))) ;; ε₂ x
                                                 xx)

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
ε₁ x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x (R₁ x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (id_left (identity x))
  (transportf (mor_disp (F x (R₁ x xx)) xx)
     (cancel_postcomposition
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
           (identity x · identity x)) (identity x)
        (identity x)
        (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
           (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
              x)))
     (♯ F (η₂ x (R₁ x xx) ;; ♯ R₂ (ε₁ x xx)) ;; ε₂ x
                                                 xx))

D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂

  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))

  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)

η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))

  (nat_trans_id

  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
ε₁ x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x (R₁ x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity x · identity x)) (identity x)
     (identity x)
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) @
   id_left (identity x))
  (♯ F (η₂ x (R₁ x xx) ;; ♯ R₂ (ε₁ x xx)) ;; ε₂ x xx)

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
ε₁ x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x (R₁ x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity x · identity x)) (identity x)
     (identity x)
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) @
   id_left (identity x))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (F x (R₁ x xx)) (F x (R₂ x xx)))
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C) (identity x)
        (identity x))
     (♯ F (η₂ x (R₁ x xx)) ;; ♯ F (♯ R₂ (ε₁ x xx))) ;; 
   ε₂ x xx)

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
ε₁ x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x (R₁ x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity x · identity x)) (identity x)
     (identity x)
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) @
   id_left (identity x))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (F x (R₁ x xx)) (F x (R₂ x xx)))
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C) (identity x)
          (identity x))
     (♯ F (η₂ x (R₁ x xx)) ;; ♯ F (♯ R₂ (ε₁ x xx))) ;; 
   ε₂ x xx)

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C

HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂

η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)

  (nat_trans_id

  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
ε₁ x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x (R₁ x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity x · identity x)) (identity x)
     (identity x)
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) @
   id_left (identity x))
  (transportf (mor_disp (F x (R₁ x xx)) xx)
     (cancel_postcomposition
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity x)
         · (# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity x))
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
           (identity x · identity x)) (identity x)
        (! functor_comp (functor_identity C)
             (identity x) (identity x)))
     (♯ F (η₂ x (R₁ x xx)) ;; ♯ F (♯ R₂ (ε₁ x xx)) ;; 
      ε₂ x xx))

D₁, D₂: disp_cat C

  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)

  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)

  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)

  (nat_trans_id

  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
ε₁ x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x (R₁ x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity x)
      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity x))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity x · identity x)) (identity x)
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C) (identity x)
          (identity x)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity x · identity x)) (identity x)
     (identity x)
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) @
   id_left (identity x))
  (♯ F (η₂ x (R₁ x xx)) ;; ♯ F (♯ R₂ (ε₁ x xx)) ;; 
   ε₂ x xx)

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
ε₁ x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x (R₁ x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity x)
      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity x))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity x · identity x)) (identity x)
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C) (identity x)
          (identity x)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity x · identity x)) (identity x)
     (identity x)
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) @
   id_left (identity x))
  (transportf (mor_disp (F x (R₁ x xx)) xx)
     (assoc
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity x))
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity x))
        (identity x))
     (♯ F (η₂ x (R₁ x xx)) ;; (♯ F (♯ R₂ (ε₁ x xx)) ;; 
                               ε₂ x xx)))

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)

  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
ε₁ x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x (R₁ x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (assoc ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity x))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity x))
     (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity x)
      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity x))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity x · identity x)) (identity x)
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C) (identity x)
          (identity x)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity x · identity x)) (identity x)
     (identity x)
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) @
   id_left (identity x))
  (♯ F (η₂ x (R₁ x xx)) ;; (♯ F (♯ R₂ (ε₁ x xx)) ;; 
                            ε₂ x xx))

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x (R₁ x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (assoc ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity x))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity x))
     (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity x)
      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity x))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity x · identity x)) (identity x)
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C) (identity x)
          (identity x)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity x · identity x)) (identity x)
     (identity x)
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) @
   id_left (identity x))
  (♯ F (η₂ x (R₁ x xx)) ;; (♯ F (♯ R₂ (ε₁ x xx)) ;; 
                            ε₂ x xx)) = ε₁ x xx

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x (R₁ x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (assoc ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity x))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity x))
     (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity x)
      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity x))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity x · identity x)) (identity x)
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C) (identity x)
          (identity x)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity x · identity x)) (identity x)
     (identity x)
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) @
   id_left (identity x))
  (♯ F (η₂ x (R₁ x xx)) ;; (♯ F (♯ R₂ (ε₁ x xx)) ;; 
                            ε₂ x xx)) = ?b
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C

xx: D₂ x
?b = ε₁ x xx

     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity x)

     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity x · identity x)) (identity x)
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C) (identity x)

C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
♯ F (♯ R₂ (ε₁ x xx)) ;; ε₂ x xx = ?t2

        apply (disp_nat_trans_ax ε₂).
      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x (R₁ x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (assoc ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity x))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity x))
     (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity x)
      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity x))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity x · identity x)) (identity x)
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C) (identity x)
          (identity x)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity x · identity x)) (identity x)
     (identity x)
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) @
   id_left (identity x))
  (♯ F (η₂ x (R₁ x xx)) ;; transportb
                             (mor_disp
                                (disp_functor_composite
                                   R₂ F x
                                   (F x (R₁ x xx)))
                                (disp_functor_identity
                                   D₂ x xx))
                             (nat_trans_ax
                                (nat_trans_id
                                   (functor_identity C
                                    ∙ functor_identity
                                        C)) x x
                                (identity x))
                             (ε₂ x (F x (R₁ x xx)) ;; 
                              ♯ (disp_functor_identity
                                   D₂) (ε₁ x xx))) =
ε₁ x xx

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂

  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))

  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
