  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x (R₁ x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (assoc ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity x))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity x))
     (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity x)
      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity x))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity x · identity x)) (identity x)
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C) (identity x)
          (identity x)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity x · identity x)) (identity x)
     (identity x)
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) @
   id_left (identity x))
  (♯ F (η₂ x (R₁ x xx)) ;; transportf
                             (mor_disp
                                (disp_functor_composite
                                   R₂ F x
                                   (F x (R₁ x xx)))
                                (disp_functor_identity
                                   D₂ x xx))
                             (! nat_trans_ax
                                  (nat_trans_id
                                     (functor_identity
                                        C
                                      ∙ functor_identity
                                          C)) x x
                                  (identity x))
                             (ε₂ x (F x (R₁ x xx)) ;; 
                              ♯ (disp_functor_identity
                                   D₂) (ε₁ x xx))) =
ε₁ x xx

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x (R₁ x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) (identity x)
     (maponpaths (λ f : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, f)
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) @
   id_left (identity x))
  (♯ F (η₂ x (R₁ x xx)) ;; transportf
                             (mor_disp
                                (F x
                                   (R₂ x
                                      (F x (R₁ x xx))))
                                xx)
                             (! is_nat_trans_id
                                  (functor_composite_data
                                     (functor_identity_data
                                        C)
                                     (functor_identity_data
                                        C)) x x
                                  (identity x))
                             (ε₂ x (F x (R₁ x xx)) ;; 
                              ε₁ x xx)) = ε₁ x xx

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x (R₁ x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) (identity x)
     (maponpaths (λ f : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, f)
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) @
   id_left (identity x))
  (transportf (mor_disp (F x (R₁ x xx)) xx)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (! is_nat_trans_id
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_identity_data C)
                (functor_identity_data C)) x x
             (identity x)))
     (♯ F (η₂ x (R₁ x xx)) ;; (ε₂ x (F x (R₁ x xx)) ;; 
                               ε₁ x xx))) = ε₁ x xx

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂

  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)

  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)

  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x (R₁ x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (! is_nat_trans_id
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_identity_data C)
             (functor_identity_data C)) x x
          (identity x)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) (identity x)
     (maponpaths (λ f : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, f)
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) @
   id_left (identity x))
  (♯ F (η₂ x (R₁ x xx)) ;; (ε₂ x (F x (R₁ x xx)) ;; 
                            ε₁ x xx)) = ε₁ x xx

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)

  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x (R₁ x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (! is_nat_trans_id
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_identity_data C)
             (functor_identity_data C)) x x
          (identity x)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) (identity x)
     (maponpaths (λ f : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, f)
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) @
   id_left (identity x))
  (transportb (mor_disp (F x (R₁ x xx)) xx)
     (assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x))
     (♯ F (η₂ x (R₁ x xx)) ;; ε₂ x (F x (R₁ x xx)) ;; 
      ε₁ x xx)) = ε₁ x xx

  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)

  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x (R₁ x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (! is_nat_trans_id
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_identity_data C)
             (functor_identity_data C)) x x
          (identity x)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) (identity x)
     (maponpaths (λ f : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, f)
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) @
   id_left (identity x))
  (transportf (mor_disp (F x (R₁ x xx)) xx)
     (! assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x))
     (♯ F (η₂ x (R₁ x xx)) ;; ε₂ x (F x (R₁ x xx)) ;; 
      ε₁ x xx)) = ε₁ x xx

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x (R₁ x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (! assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (! is_nat_trans_id
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_identity_data C)
             (functor_identity_data C)) x x
          (identity x)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) (identity x)
     (maponpaths (λ f : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, f)
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) @
   id_left (identity x))
  (♯ F (η₂ x (R₁ x xx)) ;; ε₂ x (F x (R₁ x xx)) ;; 
   ε₁ x xx) = ε₁ x xx

   ε₁ x xx) = ?b

C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F

η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)

  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x (R₁ x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (! assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (! is_nat_trans_id
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_identity_data C)
             (functor_identity_data C)) x x
          (identity x)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) (identity x)
     (maponpaths (λ f : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, f)
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) @
   id_left (identity x))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (pr1 HF₂ (functor_identity C x)
           (disp_functor_identity D₁ x (R₁ x xx)))
        (pr1 HF₂ (functor_identity C x)
           (disp_functor_identity D₁ x (R₁ x xx))))
     (id_left
        (identity
           (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x))))
     (id_disp
        (pr1 HF₂ (functor_identity C x)
           (disp_functor_identity D₁ x (R₁ x xx)))) ;; 
   ε₁ x xx) = ε₁ x xx

xx: D₂ x
transportf

  (! assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))

          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_identity_data C)
             (functor_identity_data C)) x x

  (id_disp
     (pr1 HF₂ (functor_identity C x)
        (disp_functor_identity D₁ x (R₁ x xx))) ;; 
   ε₁ x xx) = ε₁ x xx

D₁, D₂: disp_cat C

  (disp_functor_identity D₁)

  (nat_trans_id

  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)

η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)

  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x (R₁ x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity
        (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x)))
     (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
     (! id_left
          (identity
             (functor_identity C
                (functor_identity C x)))) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (! is_nat_trans_id
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_identity_data C)
             (functor_identity_data C)) x x
          (identity x)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) (identity x)
     (maponpaths (λ f : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, f)
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) @
   id_left (identity x))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (pr1 HF₂ (functor_identity C x)
           (disp_functor_identity D₁ x (R₁ x xx))) xx)
     (id_left (identity x)) (ε₁ x xx)) = ε₁ x xx

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂

HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x (R₁ x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity
        (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x)))
     (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
     (! id_left
          (identity
             (functor_identity C
                (functor_identity C x)))) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (! is_nat_trans_id
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_identity_data C)
             (functor_identity_data C)) x x
          (identity x)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) (identity x)
     (maponpaths (λ f : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, f)
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) @
   id_left (identity x))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr1 HF₂ (functor_identity C x)
           (disp_functor_identity D₁ x (R₁ x xx))) xx)
     (! id_left (identity x)) (ε₁ x xx)) = ε₁ x xx

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, F x (R₁ x xx) -->[ z] xx)
  (! id_left (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity
        (functor_identity C (functor_identity C x)))
     (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
     (! id_left
          (identity
             (functor_identity C
                (functor_identity C x)))) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (! is_nat_trans_id
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_identity_data C)
             (functor_identity_data C)) x x
          (identity x)) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) (identity x)
     (maponpaths (λ f : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, f)
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) @
   id_left (identity x)) (ε₁ x xx) = ε₁ x xx

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
R₁:= HF₁: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₁:= unit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₁)
ε₁:= counit_over_id HF₁: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₁ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
R₂:= HF₂: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η₂:= unit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite F R₂)
ε₂:= counit_over_id HF₂: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R₂ F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
isaset (C ⟦ x, x ⟧)

      apply homset_property.
    Qed.
  End Defs.

  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
isaprop (is_equiv_over_id F)

  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
isaprop (is_equiv_over_id F)

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
isProofIrrelevant (is_equiv_over_id F)

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
HF₁ = HF₂

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
isPredicate
  (λ x : right_adjoint_over_id F, form_equiv_over_id x)
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
pr1 HF₁ = pr1 HF₂

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
isPredicate
  (λ x : right_adjoint_over_id F, form_equiv_over_id x)

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
x: right_adjoint_over_id F
isaprop (form_equiv_over_id x)

      apply isaprop_form_equiv_over_id.
    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
pr1 HF₁ = pr1 HF₂

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
isPredicate
  (λ x : right_adjoint_over_id_data F,
   form_disp_adjunction_id x)
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
pr11 HF₁ = pr11 HF₂

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
isPredicate
  (λ x : right_adjoint_over_id_data F,
   form_disp_adjunction_id x)

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
x: right_adjoint_over_id_data F
isaprop (form_disp_adjunction_id x)

      apply isaprop_form_disp_adjunction_id.
    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
pr11 HF₁ = pr11 HF₂

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
disp_nat_z_iso (pr111 HF₁) (pr111 HF₂)
  (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C))
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr121 (pr1 HF₁)) x xx ;; ?p₁ x (F x xx) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F (pr111 HF₂) x xx)
  (! id_right (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr121 (pr1 HF₂)) x xx)
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr221 (pr1 HF₁)) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x) ((pr111 HF₁) x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) x))
  (♯ F (?p₁ x xx) ;; (pr221 (pr1 HF₂)) x xx)

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
disp_nat_z_iso (pr111 HF₁) (pr111 HF₂)
  (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C))
 exact (isaprop_is_equiv_over_id_nat_z_iso HF₁ HF₂).
    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
(pr121 (pr1 HF₁)) x xx ;; isaprop_is_equiv_over_id_nat_z_iso
                            HF₁ HF₂ x (F x xx) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
         functor_identity C x ⟧,
   disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
   z] disp_functor_composite F (pr111 HF₂) x xx)
  (! id_right (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x))
  ((pr121 (pr1 HF₂)) x xx)
 exact (isaprop_is_equiv_over_id_eq_1 HF₁ HF₂).
    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
HD₁: is_univalent_disp D₁
HD₂: is_univalent_disp D₂
F: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_equiv_over_id F
∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
(pr221 (pr1 HF₁)) x xx =
transportf
  (λ z : C
         ⟦ functor_identity C (functor_identity C x),
         (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) x ⟧,
   F (functor_identity C x) ((pr111 HF₁) x xx) -->[
   z] disp_functor_identity D₂ x xx)
  (id_left
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) x))
  (♯ F
     (isaprop_is_equiv_over_id_nat_z_iso HF₁ HF₂ x xx) ;; 
   (pr221 (pr1 HF₂)) x xx)
 exact (isaprop_is_equiv_over_id_eq_2 HF₁ HF₂).
  Qed.
End IsEquivOverIdIsProp.

Section PropertiesOfEquivOverId.
  Context {C : category}
          {D₁ : disp_cat C}
          {D₂ : disp_cat C}
          (LL : disp_functor (functor_identity _) D₁ D₂)
          (HLL : is_equiv_over_id LL).

  Let RR : disp_functor (functor_identity _) D₂ D₁ := HLL.
  Let η : disp_nat_trans
            (nat_trans_id _)
            (disp_functor_identity _)
            (disp_functor_composite LL RR)
    := unit_over_id HLL.
  Let ε : disp_nat_trans
            (nat_trans_id _)
            (disp_functor_composite RR LL)
            (disp_functor_identity _)
    := counit_over_id HLL.

  (**
   4. Equivalences are (split) essentially surjective
   *)
  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
LL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HLL: is_equiv_over_id LL
RR:= HLL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite LL RR)
ε:= counit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite RR LL)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj LL

  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
LL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HLL: is_equiv_over_id LL
RR:= HLL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite LL RR)
ε:= counit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite RR LL)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj LL

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
LL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HLL: is_equiv_over_id LL
RR:= HLL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite LL RR)
ε:= counit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite RR LL)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
yy: D₂ (functor_identity C x)
∑ yy0 : D₁ x,
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (LL x yy0) yy

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
LL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HLL: is_equiv_over_id LL
RR:= HLL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite LL RR)
ε:= counit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite RR LL)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
yy: D₂ (functor_identity C x)
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (ε x yy)

    exact (is_z_iso_counit_over_id HLL x yy).
  Defined.

  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
LL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HLL: is_equiv_over_id LL
RR:= HLL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite LL RR)
ε:= counit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite RR LL)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
disp_functor_disp_ess_surj LL

  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
LL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HLL: is_equiv_over_id LL
RR:= HLL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite LL RR)
ε:= counit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite RR LL)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
disp_functor_disp_ess_surj LL

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
LL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HLL: is_equiv_over_id LL
RR:= HLL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite LL RR)
ε:= counit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite RR LL)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
yy: D₂ (functor_identity C x)
∃ xx : D₁ x,
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (LL x xx) yy

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
LL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HLL: is_equiv_over_id LL
RR:= HLL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite LL RR)
ε:= counit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite RR LL)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
yy: D₂ (functor_identity C x)
∑ xx : D₁ x,
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (LL x xx) yy

    apply is_equiv_over_id_to_split_ess_surj.
  Qed.

  (**
   5. Equivalences are fully faithful
   *)
  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
LL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HLL: is_equiv_over_id LL
RR:= HLL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite LL RR)
ε:= counit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite RR LL)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
disp_functor_ff LL

  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
LL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HLL: is_equiv_over_id LL
RR:= HLL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite LL RR)
ε:= counit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite RR LL)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
disp_functor_ff LL

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
LL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HLL: is_equiv_over_id LL
RR:= HLL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite LL RR)
ε:= counit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite RR LL)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
isweq (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ LL ff)

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
LL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HLL: is_equiv_over_id LL
RR:= HLL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite LL RR)
ε:= counit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite RR LL)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
LL x xx -->[ (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] LL y yy
→ xx -->[ f] yy
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
LL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HLL: is_equiv_over_id LL
RR:= HLL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite LL RR)
ε:= counit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite RR LL)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ x0 : xx -->[ f] yy,
?g ((λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ LL ff) x0) = x0
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
LL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HLL: is_equiv_over_id LL
RR:= HLL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite LL RR)
ε:= counit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite RR LL)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏
y0 : LL x xx -->[
     (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] LL y yy,
(λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ LL ff) (?g y0) = y0

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
LL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HLL: is_equiv_over_id LL
RR:= HLL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite LL RR)
ε:= counit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite RR LL)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
LL x xx -->[ (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] LL y yy
→ xx -->[ f] yy
 
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
LL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HLL: is_equiv_over_id LL
RR:= HLL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite LL RR)
ε:= counit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite RR LL)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: LL x xx -->[ f] LL y yy
xx -->[ f] yy

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
LL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HLL: is_equiv_over_id LL
RR:= HLL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite LL RR)
ε:= counit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite RR LL)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: LL x xx -->[ f] LL y yy
nat_trans_id (functor_identity C) x
· (# (functor_identity C))%cat f
· inv_from_z_iso
    (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y)) = f

      abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite id_left, id_right ;
         apply idpath).
    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
LL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HLL: is_equiv_over_id LL
RR:= HLL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite LL RR)
ε:= counit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite RR LL)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ x0 : xx -->[ f] yy,
((λ ff : LL x xx -->[ f] LL y yy,
  transportf
    (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
           functor_identity C y ⟧,
     disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
     z] disp_functor_identity D₁ y yy)
    (is_equiv_over_id_to_ff_subproof x y f)
    (η x xx ;; ♯ RR ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                            (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HLL
                               y yy)))
 :
 LL x xx -->[ (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] LL y yy
 → xx -->[ f] yy) ((λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ LL ff) x0) =
x0
 abstract
        (intro ff ; cbn ;
         etrans ;
         [ apply maponpaths ;
           apply maponpaths_2 ;
           exact (disp_nat_trans_ax_var η ff)
         | ] ;
         cbn ;
         rewrite mor_disp_transportf_postwhisker ;
         rewrite transport_f_f ;
         rewrite assoc_disp_var ;
         rewrite transport_f_f ;
         etrans ;
         [ do 2 apply maponpaths ;
           exact (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp (is_z_iso_unit_over_id (pr2 HLL) y yy))
         | ] ;
         cbn ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker ;
         rewrite transport_f_f ;
         rewrite id_right_disp ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite transport_f_f ;
         apply transportf_set ;
         apply homset_property).
    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
LL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HLL: is_equiv_over_id LL
RR:= HLL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite LL RR)
ε:= counit_over_id HLL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite RR LL)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏
y0 : LL x xx -->[
     (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] LL y yy,
(λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ LL ff)
  (((λ ff : LL x xx -->[ f] LL y yy,
     transportf
       (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C x,
              functor_identity C y ⟧,
        disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx -->[
        z] disp_functor_identity D₁ y yy)
       (is_equiv_over_id_to_ff_subproof x y f)
       (η x xx ;; ♯ RR ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                               (is_z_iso_unit_over_id
                                  HLL y yy)))
    :
    LL x xx -->[
    (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] LL y yy
    → xx -->[ f] yy) y0) = y0
 abstract
        (cbn ; intro ff ;
         rewrite (disp_functor_transportf _ LL) ;
         rewrite disp_functor_comp ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite transport_f_f ;
         rewrite disp_functor_comp ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite mor_disp_transportf_postwhisker ;
         rewrite transport_f_f ;
         etrans ;
           [ do 2 apply maponpaths ;
             apply triangle_1_over_id_alt
           | ] ;
         rewrite assoc_disp_var ;
         rewrite transport_f_f ;
         etrans ;
           [ do 2 apply maponpaths ;
             apply (disp_nat_trans_ax (counit_over_id HLL))
           | ] ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker ;
         rewrite transport_f_f ;
         cbn ;
         rewrite assoc_disp ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite transport_f_f ;
         etrans ;
           [ apply maponpaths ;
             apply maponpaths_2 ;
             exact (triangle_1_over_id HLL x xx)
           | ] ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite mor_disp_transportf_postwhisker ;
         rewrite transport_f_f ;
         rewrite id_left_disp ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite transport_f_f ;
         apply transportf_set ;
         apply homset_property) ;
        rewrite triangle_1_over_id_alt.
  Qed.
End PropertiesOfEquivOverId.

(**
 6. Equivalences are cartesian
 *)
Section EquivIsCartesian.
  Context {C : category}
          {D₁ D₂ : disp_cat C}
          {L : disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂}
          (HL : is_equiv_over_id L).

  Let R : disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁ := HL.
  Let η : disp_nat_trans
            (nat_trans_id _)
            (disp_functor_identity _)
            (disp_functor_composite L R)
    := unit_over_id HL.
  Let ε : disp_nat_trans
            (nat_trans_id _)
            (disp_functor_composite R L)
            (disp_functor_identity _)
    := counit_over_id HL.

  Section Cartesian.
    Context {x y : C}
            {f : y --> x}
            {xx : D₁ x}
            {yy : D₁ y}
            {ff : yy -->[ f ] xx}
            (Hff : is_cartesian ff)
            {w : C}
            {g : w --> y}
            (ww : D₂ w)
            (hh : ww -->[ g · f ] L x xx).

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
isaprop (∑ gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh)

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
isaprop (∑ gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh)

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh)

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh
φ₁ = φ₂

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : ww -->[ g] L y yy, x0 ;; ♯ L ff = hh)
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : ww -->[ g] L y yy, x0 ;; ♯ L ff = hh)

        
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh
x0: ww -->[ g] L y yy
isaprop (x0 ;; ♯ L ff = hh)

        apply D₂.
      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh
make_weq (λ ff : ww -->[ g] L y yy, ♯ HL ff)
  (is_equiv_over_id_to_ff HL (equiv_inv L HL) w
     (functor_identity C y) ww (L y yy) g) (pr1 φ₁) =
make_weq (λ ff : ww -->[ g] L y yy, ♯ HL ff)
  (is_equiv_over_id_to_ff HL (equiv_inv L HL) w
     (functor_identity C y) ww (L y yy) g) (pr1 φ₂)

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh
♯ HL (pr1 φ₁) = ♯ HL (pr1 φ₂)

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh
transportf (mor_disp (HL w ww) (HL y (L y yy)))
  (id_right g)
  (♯ HL (pr1 φ₁) ;; id_disp (HL y (L y yy))) =
transportf (mor_disp (HL w ww) (HL y (L y yy)))
  (id_right g)
  (♯ HL (pr1 φ₂) ;; id_disp (HL y (L y yy)))

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh
♯ HL (pr1 φ₁) ;; id_disp (HL y (L y yy)) =
♯ HL (pr1 φ₂) ;; id_disp (HL y (L y yy))

  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))

C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))

x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh
id_disp (HL y (L y yy)) = ?t2

        exact (!(transportf_transpose_left
                   (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HL y yy)))).
      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh
♯ HL (pr1 φ₁) ;; transportf
                   (mor_disp
                      (disp_functor_composite
                         (pr1 (pr1 HL))
                         (pr12 (pr1 HL)) y yy)
                      (disp_functor_composite
                         (pr1 (pr1 HL))
                         (pr12 (pr1 HL)) y yy))
                   (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                      (identity_z_iso
                         (functor_identity C y)))
                   (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                      (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HL y yy) ;; 
                    unit_over_id (pr1 HL) y yy) =
♯ HL (pr1 φ₂) ;; id_disp (HL y (L y yy))

C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh
transportf
  (mor_disp (HL w ww)
     (disp_functor_composite (pr1 (pr1 HL))
        (pr12 (pr1 HL)) y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose g)
     (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
        (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y))))
  (♯ HL (pr1 φ₁) ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                       (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HL y yy) ;; 
                     unit_over_id (pr1 HL) y yy)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HL w ww)
     (disp_functor_composite (pr1 (pr1 HL))
        (pr12 (pr1 HL)) y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose g)
     (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
        (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y))))
  (♯ HL (pr1 φ₂) ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                       (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HL y yy) ;; 
                     unit_over_id (pr1 HL) y yy))

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh
♯ HL (pr1 φ₁) ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                    (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HL y yy) ;; 
                  unit_over_id (pr1 HL) y yy) =
♯ HL (pr1 φ₂) ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                    (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HL y yy) ;; 
                  unit_over_id (pr1 HL) y yy)

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))

  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh
transportb
  (mor_disp (HL w ww)
     (disp_functor_composite (pr1 (pr1 HL))
        (pr12 (pr1 HL)) y yy))
  (assoc g
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y)))
     (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y)))
  (♯ HL (pr1 φ₁) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                      (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HL y yy) ;; 
   unit_over_id (pr1 HL) y yy) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (HL w ww)
     (disp_functor_composite (pr1 (pr1 HL))
        (pr12 (pr1 HL)) y yy))
  (assoc g
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y)))
     (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y)))
  (♯ HL (pr1 φ₂) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                      (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HL y yy) ;; 
   unit_over_id (pr1 HL) y yy)

L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂

  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)

Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh
♯ HL (pr1 φ₁) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                   (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HL y yy) ;; 
unit_over_id (pr1 HL) y yy =
♯ HL (pr1 φ₂) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                   (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HL y yy) ;; 
unit_over_id (pr1 HL) y yy

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh
♯ HL (pr1 φ₁) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                   (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HL y yy) =
♯ HL (pr1 φ₂) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                   (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HL y yy)

HL: is_equiv_over_id L

η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)

ff: yy -->[ f] xx

w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧

♯ HL (pr1 φ₁) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                   (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HL y yy) ;; ff =
♯ HL (pr1 φ₂) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                   (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HL y yy) ;; ff

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh
transportf (mor_disp (HL w ww) xx)
  (assoc g
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y))) f)
  (♯ HL (pr1 φ₁) ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                       (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HL y yy) ;; ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp (HL w ww) xx)
  (assoc g
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C y))) f)
  (♯ HL (pr1 φ₂) ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                       (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HL y yy) ;; ff))

inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HL y yy) ;; ff = ?t2

        apply (disp_nat_trans_ax_var
                 (disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
                    (α := nat_z_iso_id _)
                    (η ,, is_z_iso_unit_over_id HL))).

D₁, D₂: disp_cat C

                   (mor_disp

                      xx) =

     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))

  (disp_functor_identity D₂)

g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧

φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh

                   (mor_disp
                      (disp_functor_composite L R y yy)

                      xx)

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh
♯ HL (pr1 φ₂) ;; transportf
                   (mor_disp (R y (L y yy)) xx)
                   (! z_iso_inv_on_right y y x
                        (identity y,,
                         identity y,,
                         id_left (identity y),,
                         id_left (identity y))
                        (f · identity x) f
                        (internal_paths_rew_r
                           (C ⟦ y, x ⟧)
                           (identity y
                            · (f · identity x))
                           (identity y · f
                            · identity x)
                           (λ p : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, f = p)
                           (z_iso_inv_on_left y x x f
                              (identity x,,
                               identity x,,
                               id_left (identity x),,
                               id_left (identity x))
                              (identity y · f)
                              (! is_nat_trans_id
                                   (functor_identity_data
                                      C) y x f))
                           (assoc (identity y) f
                              (identity x))))
                   (♯ R (♯ L ff) ;; disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv_data
                                      (η,,
                                       is_z_iso_unit_over_id
                                         (pr2 HL)) x
                                      xx) =
♯ HL (pr1 φ₁) ;; transportf
                   (mor_disp (R y (L y yy)) xx)
                   (! z_iso_inv_on_right y y x
                        (identity y,,
                         identity y,,
                         id_left (identity y),,
                         id_left (identity y))
                        (f · identity x) f
                        (internal_paths_rew_r
                           (C ⟦ y, x ⟧)
                           (identity y
                            · (f · identity x))
                           (identity y · f
                            · identity x)
                           (λ p : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, f = p)
                           (z_iso_inv_on_left y x x f
                              (identity x,,
                               identity x,,
                               id_left (identity x),,
                               id_left (identity x))
                              (identity y · f)
                              (! is_nat_trans_id
                                   (functor_identity_data
                                      C) y x f))
                           (assoc (identity y) f
                              (identity x))))
                   (♯ R (♯ L ff) ;; disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv_data
                                      (η,,
                                       is_z_iso_unit_over_id
                                         (pr2 HL)) x
                                      xx)

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh
transportf (mor_disp (HL w ww) xx)
  (maponpaths (compose g)
     (! z_iso_inv_on_right y y x
          (identity y,,
           identity y,,
           id_left (identity y),, id_left (identity y))
          (f · identity x) f
          (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ y, x ⟧)
             (identity y · (f · identity x))
             (identity y · f · identity x)
             (λ p : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, f = p)
             (z_iso_inv_on_left y x x f
                (identity x,,
                 identity x,,
                 id_left (identity x),,
                 id_left (identity x))
                (identity y · f)
                (! is_nat_trans_id
                     (functor_identity_data C) y x f))
             (assoc (identity y) f (identity x)))))
  (♯ HL (pr1 φ₂) ;; (♯ R (♯ L ff) ;; disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv_data
                                       (η,,
                                        is_z_iso_unit_over_id
                                          (pr2 HL)) x
                                       xx)) =
transportf (mor_disp (HL w ww) xx)
  (maponpaths (compose g)
     (! z_iso_inv_on_right y y x
          (identity y,,
           identity y,,
           id_left (identity y),, id_left (identity y))
          (f · identity x) f
          (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ y, x ⟧)
             (identity y · (f · identity x))
             (identity y · f · identity x)
             (λ p : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, f = p)
             (z_iso_inv_on_left y x x f
                (identity x,,
                 identity x,,
                 id_left (identity x),,
                 id_left (identity x))
                (identity y · f)
                (! is_nat_trans_id
                     (functor_identity_data C) y x f))
             (assoc (identity y) f (identity x)))))
  (♯ HL (pr1 φ₁) ;; (♯ R (♯ L ff) ;; disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv_data
                                       (η,,
                                        is_z_iso_unit_over_id
                                          (pr2 HL)) x
                                       xx))

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh
♯ HL (pr1 φ₂) ;; (♯ R (♯ L ff) ;; disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv_data
                                    (η,,
                                     is_z_iso_unit_over_id
                                       (pr2 HL)) x xx) =
♯ HL (pr1 φ₁) ;; (♯ R (♯ L ff) ;; disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv_data
                                    (η,,
                                     is_z_iso_unit_over_id
                                       (pr2 HL)) x xx)

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh
transportb (mor_disp (HL w ww) xx)
  (assoc g f (identity x))
  (♯ HL (pr1 φ₂) ;; ♯ R (♯ L ff) ;; disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv_data
                                      (η,,
                                       is_z_iso_unit_over_id
                                         (pr2 HL)) x
                                      xx) =
transportb (mor_disp (HL w ww) xx)
  (assoc g f (identity x))
  (♯ HL (pr1 φ₁) ;; ♯ R (♯ L ff) ;; disp_nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv_data
                                      (η,,
                                       is_z_iso_unit_over_id
                                         (pr2 HL)) x
                                      xx)

C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh
♯ HL (pr1 φ₂) ;; ♯ R (♯ L ff) =
♯ HL (pr1 φ₁) ;; ♯ R (♯ L ff)

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh
transportf (mor_disp (R w ww) (R x (L x xx)))
  (functor_comp (functor_identity C) g f)
  (♯ R (pr1 φ₂ ;; ♯ L ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp (R w ww) (R x (L x xx)))
  (functor_comp (functor_identity C) g f)
  (♯ R (pr1 φ₁ ;; ♯ L ff))

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh
pr1 φ₂ ;; ♯ L ff = pr1 φ₁ ;; ♯ L ff

      exact (pr2 φ₂ @ !(pr2 φ₁)).
    Qed.

C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁

  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)

  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)

C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
m:= cartesian_factorisation Hff g
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C w,
            functor_identity C x ⟧,
      R w ww -->[ z] disp_functor_identity D₁ x xx)
     (id_right
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (g · f)))
     (♯ R hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                  (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HL x xx))): R w ww -->[ g] yy
ww -->[ g] L y yy

      exact (transportf
               (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _)
               (id_left _)
               (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso (is_z_iso_counit_over_id HL w ww)
                ;;
                ♯L m)).
    Defined.

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
is_cartesian_equiv_over_id_fact ;; ♯ L ff = hh

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁

f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧

yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
