C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, y ⟧, ww -->[ z] L y yy)
  (id_left g)
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_counit_over_id (pr2 HL) w ww) ;; ♯ L
                                                 (cartesian_factorisation
                                                 Hff g
                                                 (transportf
                                                 (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ w,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                                 R w
                                                 ww -->[
                                                 z] xx)
                                                 (id_right
                                                 (g
                                                 · f))
                                                 (♯ R
                                                 hh ;; 
                                                 inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 (is_z_iso_unit_over_id
                                                 (pr2
                                                 HL) x
                                                 xx))))) ;; 
♯ L ff = hh

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
transportf (mor_disp ww (L x xx))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity w · g) g f
     (id_left g))
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_counit_over_id (pr2 HL) w ww) ;; ♯ L
                                                 (cartesian_factorisation
                                                 Hff g
                                                 (transportf
                                                 (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ w,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                                 R w
                                                 ww -->[
                                                 z] xx)
                                                 (id_right
                                                 (g
                                                 · f))
                                                 (♯ R
                                                 hh ;; 
                                                 inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 (is_z_iso_unit_over_id
                                                 (pr2
                                                 HL) x
                                                 xx)))) ;; 
   ♯ L ff) = hh

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
transportf (mor_disp ww (L x xx))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity w · g) g f
     (id_left g))
  (transportf (mor_disp ww (L x xx))
     (assoc (identity w) g f)
     (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
        (is_z_iso_counit_over_id (pr2 HL) w ww) ;; 
      (♯ L
         (cartesian_factorisation Hff g
            (transportf
               (λ z : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, R w ww -->[ z] xx)
               (id_right (g · f))
               (♯ R hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                            (is_z_iso_unit_over_id
                               (pr2 HL) x xx)))) ;; 
       ♯ L ff))) = hh

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
transportf (mor_disp ww (L x xx))
  (assoc (identity w) g f @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity w · g) g f
     (id_left g))
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_counit_over_id (pr2 HL) w ww) ;; (♯ L
                                                 (cartesian_factorisation
                                                 Hff g
                                                 (transportf
                                                 (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ w,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                                 R w
                                                 ww -->[
                                                 z] xx)
                                                 (id_right
                                                 (g
                                                 · f))
                                                 (♯ R
                                                 hh ;; 
                                                 inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 (is_z_iso_unit_over_id
                                                 (pr2
                                                 HL) x
                                                 xx)))) ;; 
                                                 ♯ L
                                                 ff)) =
hh

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
transportf (mor_disp ww (L x xx))
  (assoc (identity w) g f @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity w · g) g f
     (id_left g))
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_counit_over_id (pr2 HL) w ww) ;; (♯ L
                                                 (cartesian_factorisation
                                                 Hff g
                                                 (transportf
                                                 (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ w,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                                 R w
                                                 ww -->[
                                                 z] xx)
                                                 (id_right
                                                 (g
                                                 · f))
                                                 (♯ R
                                                 hh ;; 
                                                 inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 (is_z_iso_unit_over_id
                                                 (pr2
                                                 HL) x
                                                 xx)))) ;; 
                                                 ♯ L
                                                 ff)) =
?b
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
?b = hh

transportf (mor_disp ww (L x xx))

  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso

                                                 R w

                                                 z] xx)
                                                 (id_right

C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
♯ L
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff g
     (transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, R w ww -->[ z] xx)
        (id_right (g · f))
        (♯ R hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id (pr2 HL) x
                        xx)))) ;; ♯ L ff = ?t2

        
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
?t2 =
♯ L
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff g
     (transportf (λ z : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, R w ww -->[ z] xx)
        (id_right (g · f))
        (♯ R hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id (pr2 HL) x
                        xx)))) ;; ♯ L ff

        apply (disp_functor_comp_var L).

C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
transportf (mor_disp ww (L x xx))
  (assoc (identity w) g f @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity w · g) g f
     (id_left g))
  (transportf (mor_disp ww (L x xx))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity w))
        (functor_comp (functor_identity C) g f))
     (transportf (mor_disp ww (L x xx))
        (maponpaths (compose (identity w))
           (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (id_right (g · f))))
        (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
           (is_z_iso_counit_over_id (pr2 HL) w ww) ;; 
         ♯ L
           (♯ R hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                        (is_z_iso_unit_over_id
                           (pr2 HL) x xx))))) = hh

     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat

   maponpaths (compose (identity w))
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C) g f) @

     (id_left g))
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_counit_over_id (pr2 HL) w ww) ;; (♯ L
                                                 (♯ R
                                                 hh) ;; 
                                                 ♯ L
                                                 (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 (is_z_iso_unit_over_id
                                                 (pr2
                                                 HL) x
                                                 xx)))) =
?b
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
?b = hh

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
transportf (mor_disp ww (L x xx))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity w))
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C) (g · f)
          (identity x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity w))
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (id_right (g · f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity w))
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C) g f) @
   assoc (identity w) g f @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity w · g) g f
     (id_left g))
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_counit_over_id (pr2 HL) w ww) ;; (♯ L
                                                 (♯ R
                                                 hh) ;; 
                                                 ♯ L
                                                 (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 (is_z_iso_unit_over_id
                                                 (pr2
                                                 HL) x
                                                 xx)))) =
?b

f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧

                  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id (pr2 HL) x
                        xx)) = ?t2

f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
transportf
  (mor_disp ww
     (disp_functor_identity D₂ x (pr1 L x xx)))
  (! assoc (identity w)
       (nat_trans_id
          (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) w)
       ((# (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))%cat
          (g · f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity w))
     (! nat_trans_ax
          (nat_trans_id
             (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
          w x (g · f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity w))
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C) (g · f)
          (identity x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity w))
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (id_right (g · f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity w))
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C) g f) @
   assoc (identity w) g f @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity w · g) g f
     (id_left g))
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_counit_over_id (pr2 HL) w ww) ;; ε w ww ;; 
   ♯ (disp_functor_identity D₂) hh) = ?b
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
?b = hh

  (is_z_iso_counit_over_id (pr2 HL) w ww) ;; ε w ww =
?y'

        apply (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor (is_z_iso_counit_over_id (pr2 HL) w ww)).

D₁, D₂: disp_cat C

x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
transportf
  (mor_disp ww
     (disp_functor_identity D₂ x (pr1 L x xx)))
  (! assoc (identity w)
       (nat_trans_id
          (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) w)
       ((# (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))%cat
          (g · f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity w))
     (! nat_trans_ax
          (nat_trans_id
             (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
          w x (g · f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity w))
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C) (g · f)
          (identity x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity w))
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (id_right (g · f))) @

     (functor_comp (functor_identity C) g f) @
   assoc (identity w) g f @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity w · g) g f
     (id_left g))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (disp_functor_identity D₂ w ww)
        (disp_functor_identity D₂ w ww))
     (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
        (identity_z_iso
           ((functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
              w)))
     (id_disp (disp_functor_identity D₂ w ww)) ;; 
   ♯ (disp_functor_identity D₂) hh) = hh

f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧

Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧

  (mor_disp ww

          (g · f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity w))
     (! nat_trans_ax
          (nat_trans_id
             (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
          w x (g · f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity w))
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C) (g · f)
          (identity x)) @

     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat

     (id_left g))

                                                 D₂)

f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w

  (mor_disp (disp_functor_identity D₂ w ww)
     (disp_functor_identity D₂ x (pr1 L x xx)))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity
        ((functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) w))
     (identity w
      · nat_trans_id
          (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) w)
     ((# (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))%cat
        (g · f))
     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
          (identity_z_iso
             ((functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
                w))) @
   ! assoc (identity w)

          (g · f)) @

             (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
          w x (g · f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity w))
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C) (g · f)
          (identity x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity w))
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (id_right (g · f))) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity w))
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C) g f) @
   assoc (identity w) g f @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity w · g) g f
     (id_left g))
  (id_disp (disp_functor_identity D₂ w ww) ;; ♯ (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₂)
                                                hh) =
hh

f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
transportf (mor_disp ww (pr1 L x xx))
  (! id_left (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity w)
     (identity w · identity w) (g · f)
     (! id_left (identity w)) @
   ! assoc (identity w) (identity w) (g · f) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity w))
     (! is_nat_trans_id
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_identity_data C)
             (functor_identity_data C)) w x (g · f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity w))
     (maponpaths (λ f : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, f)
        (id_right (g · f))) @
   assoc (identity w) g f @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity w · g) g f
     (id_left g)) hh = hh

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[ g · f] L x xx
isaset (C ⟦ w, x ⟧)

      apply homset_property.
    Qed.
  End Cartesian.

  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
is_cartesian_disp_functor L

  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
is_cartesian_disp_functor L

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, functor_identity C y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[
g · (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] L x xx
∃! gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)

w: C
g: C ⟦ w, functor_identity C y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[

isaprop (∑ gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh)

  (disp_functor_identity D₁)

Hff: is_cartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ w, functor_identity C y ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: ww -->[
g · (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] L x xx
(λ gg : ww -->[ g] L y yy, gg ;; ♯ L ff = hh)
  (is_cartesian_equiv_over_id_fact Hff ww hh)
 exact (is_cartesian_equiv_over_id_comm Hff ww hh).
  Defined.
End EquivIsCartesian.

(**
 7. Equivalences are opcartesian
 *)
Section EquivIsOpcartesian.
  Context {C : category}
          {D₁ D₂ : disp_cat C}
          {L : disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂}
          (HL : is_equiv_over_id L).

  Let R : disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁ := HL.
  Let η : disp_nat_trans
            (nat_trans_id _)
            (disp_functor_identity _)
            (disp_functor_composite L R)
    := unit_over_id HL.
  Let ε : disp_nat_trans
            (nat_trans_id _)
            (disp_functor_composite R L)
            (disp_functor_identity _)
    := counit_over_id HL.

  Section Opcartesian.
    Context {x y : C}
            {f : y --> x}
            {xx : D₁ x}
            {yy : D₁ y}
            {ff : yy -->[ f ] xx}
            (Hff : is_opcartesian ff)
            {w : C}
            {g : x --> w}
            (ww : D₂ w)
            (hh : L y yy -->[ f · g ] ww).

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
isaprop (∑ gg : L x xx -->[ g] ww, ♯ L ff ;; gg = hh)

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)

f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
isaprop (∑ gg : L x xx -->[ g] ww, ♯ L ff ;; gg = hh)

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ gg : L x xx -->[ g] ww, ♯ L ff ;; gg = hh)

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : L x xx -->[ g] ww, ♯ L ff ;; gg = hh
φ₁ = φ₂

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : L x xx -->[ g] ww, ♯ L ff ;; gg = hh
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : L x xx -->[ g] ww, ♯ L ff ;; x0 = hh)

w: C

ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww

pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

ww: D₂ w

φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : L x xx -->[ g] ww, ♯ L ff ;; gg = hh

  (λ x0 : L x xx -->[ g] ww, ♯ L ff ;; x0 = hh)

        
C: category

f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧

ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : L x xx -->[ g] ww, ♯ L ff ;; gg = hh
x0: L x xx -->[ g] ww
isaprop (♯ L ff ;; x0 = hh)

        apply D₂.

f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧

w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : L x xx -->[ g] ww, ♯ L ff ;; gg = hh
make_weq (λ ff : L x xx -->[ g] ww, ♯ HL ff)
  (is_equiv_over_id_to_ff HL (equiv_inv L HL)
     (functor_identity C x) w (L x xx) ww g) (pr1 φ₁) =
make_weq (λ ff : L x xx -->[ g] ww, ♯ HL ff)
  (is_equiv_over_id_to_ff HL (equiv_inv L HL)
     (functor_identity C x) w (L x xx) ww g) (pr1 φ₂)

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : L x xx -->[ g] ww, ♯ L ff ;; gg = hh
♯ HL (pr1 φ₁) = ♯ HL (pr1 φ₂)

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : L x xx -->[ g] ww, ♯ L ff ;; gg = hh
transportf (mor_disp (HL x (L x xx)) (HL w ww))
  (id_left g)
  (id_disp (HL x (L x xx)) ;; ♯ HL (pr1 φ₁)) =
transportf (mor_disp (HL x (L x xx)) (HL w ww))
  (id_left g)
  (id_disp (HL x (L x xx)) ;; ♯ HL (pr1 φ₂))

                   (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HL _ _)))).
      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : L x xx -->[ g] ww, ♯ L ff ;; gg = hh
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_composite (pr1 (pr1 HL))
        (pr12 (pr1 HL)) x xx)
     (disp_functor_composite (pr1 (pr1 HL))
        (pr12 (pr1 HL)) x xx))
  (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
     (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HL x xx) ;; unit_over_id
                                          (pr1 HL) x
                                          xx) ;; ♯ HL
                                                 (pr1
                                                 φ₁) =
id_disp (HL x (L x xx)) ;; ♯ HL (pr1 φ₂)

C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : L x xx -->[ g] ww, ♯ L ff ;; gg = hh
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_composite (pr1 (pr1 HL))
        (pr12 (pr1 HL)) x xx) (HL w ww))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
      · identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
     (identity x) g
     (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
        (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))))
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HL x xx) ;; unit_over_id
                                          (pr1 HL) x
                                          xx ;; ♯ HL
                                                 (pr1
                                                 φ₁)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_composite (pr1 (pr1 HL))
        (pr12 (pr1 HL)) x xx) (HL w ww))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
      · identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
     (identity x) g
     (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
        (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))))
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HL x xx) ;; unit_over_id
                                          (pr1 HL) x
                                          xx ;; ♯ HL
                                                 (pr1
                                                 φ₂))

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : L x xx -->[ g] ww, ♯ L ff ;; gg = hh
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HL x xx) ;; unit_over_id
                                       (pr1 HL) x xx ;; 
♯ HL (pr1 φ₁) =
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
  (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HL x xx) ;; unit_over_id
                                       (pr1 HL) x xx ;; 
♯ HL (pr1 φ₂)

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : L x xx -->[ g] ww, ♯ L ff ;; gg = hh
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_composite (pr1 (pr1 HL))
        (pr12 (pr1 HL)) x xx) (HL w ww))
  (assoc
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
     (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)) g)
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HL x xx) ;; (unit_over_id
                                           (pr1 HL) x
                                           xx ;; ♯ HL
                                                 (pr1
                                                 φ₁))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (disp_functor_composite (pr1 (pr1 HL))
        (pr12 (pr1 HL)) x xx) (HL w ww))
  (assoc
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)))
     (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x)) g)
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
     (is_z_iso_unit_over_id HL x xx) ;; (unit_over_id
                                           (pr1 HL) x
                                           xx ;; ♯ HL
                                                 (pr1
                                                 φ₂)))

HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : L x xx -->[ g] ww, ♯ L ff ;; gg = hh
transportf (mor_disp yy (HL w ww))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity y · f)
     (f · identity x) g
     (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) y x
          f))
  (η y yy ;; ♯ R (♯ L ff) ;; ♯ HL (pr1 φ₂)) =
transportf (mor_disp yy (HL w ww))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity y · f)
     (f · identity x) g
     (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) y x
          f))
  (η y yy ;; ♯ R (♯ L ff) ;; ♯ HL (pr1 φ₁))

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : L x xx -->[ g] ww, ♯ L ff ;; gg = hh
η y yy ;; ♯ R (♯ L ff) ;; ♯ HL (pr1 φ₂) =
η y yy ;; ♯ R (♯ L ff) ;; ♯ HL (pr1 φ₁)

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : L x xx -->[ g] ww, ♯ L ff ;; gg = hh
transportf (mor_disp yy (HL w ww))
  (assoc (identity y) f g)
  (η y yy ;; (♯ R (♯ L ff) ;; ♯ HL (pr1 φ₂))) =
transportf (mor_disp yy (HL w ww))
  (assoc (identity y) f g)
  (η y yy ;; (♯ R (♯ L ff) ;; ♯ HL (pr1 φ₁)))

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L

η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))

f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : L x xx -->[ g] ww, ♯ L ff ;; gg = hh
♯ R (♯ L ff) ;; ♯ HL (pr1 φ₂) =
♯ R (♯ L ff) ;; ♯ HL (pr1 φ₁)

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : L x xx -->[ g] ww, ♯ L ff ;; gg = hh
transportf (mor_disp (R y (L y yy)) (R w ww))
  (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g)
  (♯ R (♯ L ff ;; pr1 φ₂)) =
transportf (mor_disp (R y (L y yy)) (R w ww))
  (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g)
  (♯ R (♯ L ff ;; pr1 φ₁))

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ gg : L x xx -->[ g] ww, ♯ L ff ;; gg = hh
♯ L ff ;; pr1 φ₂ = ♯ L ff ;; pr1 φ₁

      exact (pr2 φ₂ @ !(pr2 φ₁)).
    Qed.

C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
m:= opcartesian_factorisation Hff g
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ functor_identity C y,
            functor_identity C w ⟧,
      disp_functor_identity D₁ y yy -->[ z] R w ww)
     (id_left
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g)))
     (η y yy ;; ♯ R hh)): xx -->[ g] R w ww
L x xx -->[ g] ww

      exact (transportf
               (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _)
               (id_right _)
               (♯L m ;; ε w ww)).
    Defined.

  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))

ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
♯ L ff ;; is_opcartesian_equiv_over_id_fact = hh

C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
♯ L ff ;; transportf
            (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, L x xx -->[ z] ww)
            (id_right g)
            (♯ L
               (opcartesian_factorisation Hff g
                  (transportf
                     (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧,
                      yy -->[ z] R w ww)
                     (id_left (f · g))
                     (η y yy ;; ♯ R hh))) ;; ε w ww) =
hh

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
transportf (mor_disp (L y yy) ww)
  (maponpaths (compose f) (id_right g))
  (♯ L ff ;; (♯ L
                (opcartesian_factorisation Hff g
                   (transportf
                      (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧,
                       yy -->[ z] R w ww)
                      (id_left (f · g))
                      (η y yy ;; ♯ R hh))) ;; ε w ww)) =
hh

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
transportf (mor_disp (L y yy) ww)
  (maponpaths (compose f) (id_right g))
  (transportb (mor_disp (L y yy) ww)
     (assoc f g (identity w))
     (♯ L ff ;; ♯ L
                  (opcartesian_factorisation Hff g
                     (transportf
                        (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧,
                         yy -->[ z] R w ww)
                        (id_left (f · g))
                        (η y yy ;; ♯ R hh))) ;; ε w ww)) =
hh

C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
♯ L ff ;; ♯ L
            (opcartesian_factorisation Hff g
               (transportf
                  (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧, yy -->[ z] R w ww)
                  (id_left (f · g)) (η y yy ;; ♯ R hh))) ;; 
ε w ww = ?t2

        
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
♯ L ff ;; ♯ L
            (opcartesian_factorisation Hff g
               (transportf
                  (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧, yy -->[ z] R w ww)
                  (id_left (f · g)) (η y yy ;; ♯ R hh))) =
?y'

        
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
?y' =
♯ L ff ;; ♯ L
            (opcartesian_factorisation Hff g
               (transportf
                  (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧, yy -->[ z] R w ww)
                  (id_left (f · g)) (η y yy ;; ♯ R hh)))

        apply (disp_functor_comp_var L).
      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
transportf (mor_disp (L y yy) ww)
  (! assoc f g (identity w) @
   maponpaths (compose f) (id_right g))
  (transportf (mor_disp (L y yy) (L w (R w ww)))
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g)
     (♯ L
        (ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation Hff g
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧,
                     yy -->[ z] R w ww)
                    (id_left (f · g))
                    (η y yy ;; ♯ R hh)))) ;; ε w ww) =
hh

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
transportf (mor_disp (L y yy) ww)
  (! assoc f g (identity w) @
   maponpaths (compose f) (id_right g))
  (transportf (mor_disp (L y yy) (L w (R w ww)))
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g)
     (♯ L
        (transportf
           (λ z : C ⟦ y, w ⟧, yy -->[ z] R w ww)
           (id_left (f · g)) (η y yy ;; ♯ R hh))) ;; 
   ε w ww) = hh

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
transportf (mor_disp (L y yy) ww)
  (! assoc f g (identity w) @
   maponpaths (compose f) (id_right g))
  (transportf (mor_disp (L y yy) (L w (R w ww)))
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g)
     (transportf (mor_disp (L y yy) (L w (R w ww)))
        (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
           (id_left (f · g))) (♯ L (η y yy ;; ♯ R hh))) ;; 
   ε w ww) = hh

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
transportf (mor_disp (L y yy) ww)
  (! assoc f g (identity w) @
   maponpaths (compose f) (id_right g))
  (transportf (mor_disp (L y yy) ww)
     (cancel_postcomposition
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g)) (f · g)
        (identity w)
        (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g))
     (transportf (mor_disp (L y yy) ww)
        (cancel_postcomposition
           ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (identity y · (f · g)))
           ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
           (identity w)
           (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
              (id_left (f · g))))
        (♯ L (η y yy ;; ♯ R hh) ;; ε w ww))) = hh

  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))

  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
transportf (mor_disp (L y yy) ww)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity y · (f · g)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     (identity w)
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (id_left (f · g))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g)) (f · g)
     (identity w)
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g) @
   ! assoc f g (identity w) @
   maponpaths (compose f) (id_right g))
  (♯ L (η y yy ;; ♯ R hh) ;; ε w ww) = hh

x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
transportf (mor_disp (L y yy) ww)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity y · (f · g)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     (identity w)
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (id_left (f · g))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g)) (f · g)
     (identity w)
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g) @
   ! assoc f g (identity w) @
   maponpaths (compose f) (id_right g))
  (transportb (mor_disp (L y yy) (L w (R w ww)))
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C) (identity y)
        (f · g)) (♯ L (η y yy) ;; ♯ L (♯ R hh)) ;; 
   ε w ww) = hh

f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
transportf (mor_disp (L y yy) ww)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity y · (f · g)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     (identity w)
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (id_left (f · g))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g)) (f · g)
     (identity w)
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g) @
   ! assoc f g (identity w) @

  (transportf (mor_disp (L y yy) (L w (R w ww)))
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C) (identity y)
          (f · g)) (♯ L (η y yy) ;; ♯ L (♯ R hh)) ;; 
   ε w ww) = hh

  (cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity y · (f · g)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     (identity w)
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat

        (! functor_comp (functor_identity C)
             (identity y) (f · g)))
     (♯ L (η y yy) ;; ♯ L (♯ R hh) ;; ε w ww)) = hh

w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧

     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y)
      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity y · (f · g))) (identity w)
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C) (identity y)
          (f · g)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat

   ! assoc f g (identity w) @
   maponpaths (compose f) (id_right g))
  (transportf (mor_disp (L y yy) ww)
     (assoc
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y))
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
        (identity w))
     (♯ L (η y yy) ;; (♯ L (♯ R hh) ;; ε w ww))) = hh

  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
?b = hh

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
transportf (mor_disp (L y yy) ww)
  (assoc ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     (identity w) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y)
      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity y · (f · g))) (identity w)
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C) (identity y)
          (f · g)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity y · (f · g)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     (identity w)
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (id_left (f · g))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g)) (f · g)
     (identity w)
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g) @
   ! assoc f g (identity w) @
   maponpaths (compose f) (id_right g))
  (♯ L (η y yy) ;; (♯ L (♯ R hh) ;; ε w ww)) = ?b

        
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
♯ L (♯ R hh) ;; ε w ww = ?t2

        apply (disp_nat_trans_ax ε).
      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
transportf (mor_disp (L y yy) ww)
  (assoc ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     (identity w) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y)
      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity y · (f · g))) (identity w)
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C) (identity y)
          (f · g)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity y · (f · g)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     (identity w)
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (id_left (f · g))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g)) (f · g)
     (identity w)
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g) @
   ! assoc f g (identity w) @
   maponpaths (compose f) (id_right g))
  (♯ L (η y yy) ;; transportb
                     (mor_disp
                        (disp_functor_composite R L y
                           (L y yy))
                        (disp_functor_identity D₂ w ww))
                     (nat_trans_ax
                        (nat_trans_id
                           (functor_identity C
                            ∙ functor_identity C)) y w
                        (f · g))
                     (ε y (L y yy) ;; ♯ (disp_functor_identity
                                           D₂) hh)) =
hh

C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
transportf
  (mor_disp (L y yy) (disp_functor_identity D₂ w ww))
  (! assoc ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y))
       (nat_trans_id
          (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) y)
       ((# (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))%cat
          (f · g)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y)))
     (! nat_trans_ax
          (nat_trans_id
             (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
          y w (f · g)) @
   assoc ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     (identity w) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y)
      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity y · (f · g))) (identity w)
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C) (identity y)
          (f · g)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity y · (f · g)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     (identity w)
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (id_left (f · g))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g)) (f · g)
     (identity w)
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g) @
   ! assoc f g (identity w) @
   maponpaths (compose f) (id_right g))
  (♯ L (η y yy) ;; ε y (L y yy) ;; ♯ (disp_functor_identity
                                        D₂) hh) = 
?b

        
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
♯ L (η y yy) ;; ε y (L y yy) ;; ♯ (disp_functor_identity
                                     D₂) hh = ?t2

        
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
♯ L (η y yy) ;; ε y (L y yy) = ?y'

        apply (triangle_1_over_id HL).
      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
transportf
  (mor_disp (L y yy) (disp_functor_identity D₂ w ww))
  (! assoc ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y))
       (nat_trans_id
          (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) y)
       ((# (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))%cat
          (f · g)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y)))
     (! nat_trans_ax
          (nat_trans_id
             (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
          y w (f · g)) @
   assoc ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     (identity w) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y)
      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity y · (f · g))) (identity w)
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C) (identity y)
          (f · g)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity y · (f · g)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     (identity w)
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (id_left (f · g))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g)) (f · g)
     (identity w)
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g) @
   ! assoc f g (identity w) @
   maponpaths (compose f) (id_right g))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (pr1 HL (functor_identity C y)
           (disp_functor_identity D₁ y yy))
        (pr1 HL (functor_identity C y)
           (disp_functor_identity D₁ y yy)))
     (id_left
        (identity
           (functor_identity C (functor_identity C y))))
     (id_disp
        (pr1 HL (functor_identity C y)
           (disp_functor_identity D₁ y yy))) ;; ♯ (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₂)
                                                 hh) =
hh

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
transportf
  (mor_disp (L y yy) (disp_functor_identity D₂ w ww))
  (! assoc ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y))
       (nat_trans_id
          (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) y)
       ((# (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))%cat
          (f · g)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y)))
     (! nat_trans_ax
          (nat_trans_id
             (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
          y w (f · g)) @
   assoc ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     (identity w) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y)
      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity y · (f · g))) (identity w)
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C) (identity y)
          (f · g)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity y · (f · g)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     (identity w)
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (id_left (f · g))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g)) (f · g)
     (identity w)
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g) @
   ! assoc f g (identity w) @
   maponpaths (compose f) (id_right g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr1 HL (functor_identity C y)
           (disp_functor_identity D₁ y yy))
        (pr1 HL (functor_identity C y)
           (disp_functor_identity D₁ y yy)))
     (! id_left
          (identity
             (functor_identity C
                (functor_identity C y))))
     (id_disp
        (pr1 HL (functor_identity C y)
           (disp_functor_identity D₁ y yy))) ;; ♯ (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₂)
                                                 hh) =
hh

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
