  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
transportf
  (mor_disp (L y yy) (disp_functor_identity D₂ w ww))
  (! assoc ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y))
       (nat_trans_id
          (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) y)
       ((# (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))%cat
          (f · g)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y)))
     (! nat_trans_ax
          (nat_trans_id
             (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
          y w (f · g)) @
   assoc ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     (identity w) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y)
      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity y · (f · g))) (identity w)
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C) (identity y)
          (f · g)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity y · (f · g)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     (identity w)
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (id_left (f · g))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g)) (f · g)
     (identity w)
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g) @
   ! assoc f g (identity w) @
   maponpaths (compose f) (id_right g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr1 HL (functor_identity C y)
           (disp_functor_identity D₁ y yy))
        (disp_functor_identity D₂ w ww))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (identity
           (functor_identity C (functor_identity C y)))
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y)
         · nat_trans_id
             (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C)
             y)
        ((# (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))%cat
           (f · g))
        (! id_left
             (identity
                (functor_identity C
                   (functor_identity C y)))))
     (id_disp
        (pr1 HL (functor_identity C y)
           (disp_functor_identity D₁ y yy)) ;; ♯ (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₂)
                                                 hh)) =
hh

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 HL (functor_identity C y)
        (disp_functor_identity D₁ y yy))
     (disp_functor_identity D₂ w ww))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity
        (functor_identity C (functor_identity C y)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y)
      · nat_trans_id
          (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) y)
     ((# (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))%cat
        (f · g))
     (! id_left
          (identity
             (functor_identity C
                (functor_identity C y)))) @
   ! assoc ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y))
       (nat_trans_id
          (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) y)
       ((# (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))%cat
          (f · g)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y)))
     (! nat_trans_ax
          (nat_trans_id
             (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
          y w (f · g)) @
   assoc ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     (identity w) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y)
      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity y · (f · g))) (identity w)
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C) (identity y)
          (f · g)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity y · (f · g)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     (identity w)
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (id_left (f · g))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g)) (f · g)
     (identity w)
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g) @
   ! assoc f g (identity w) @
   maponpaths (compose f) (id_right g))
  (id_disp
     (pr1 HL (functor_identity C y)
        (disp_functor_identity D₁ y yy)) ;; ♯ (disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₂)
                                              hh) = hh

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 HL (functor_identity C y)
        (disp_functor_identity D₁ y yy))
     (disp_functor_identity D₂ w ww))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity
        (functor_identity C (functor_identity C y)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y)
      · nat_trans_id
          (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) y)
     ((# (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))%cat
        (f · g))
     (! id_left
          (identity
             (functor_identity C
                (functor_identity C y)))) @
   ! assoc ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y))
       (nat_trans_id
          (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) y)
       ((# (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))%cat
          (f · g)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y)))
     (! nat_trans_ax
          (nat_trans_id
             (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
          y w (f · g)) @
   assoc ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     (identity w) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y)
      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity y · (f · g))) (identity w)
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C) (identity y)
          (f · g)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity y · (f · g)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     (identity w)
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (id_left (f · g))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g)) (f · g)
     (identity w)
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g) @
   ! assoc f g (identity w) @
   maponpaths (compose f) (id_right g))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (pr1 HL (functor_identity C y)
           (disp_functor_identity D₁ y yy))
        (disp_functor_identity D₂ w ww))
     (id_left
        ((# (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))%cat
           (f · g))) (♯ (disp_functor_identity D₂) hh)) =
hh

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 HL (functor_identity C y)
        (disp_functor_identity D₁ y yy))
     (disp_functor_identity D₂ w ww))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity
        (functor_identity C (functor_identity C y)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y)
      · nat_trans_id
          (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) y)
     ((# (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))%cat
        (f · g))
     (! id_left
          (identity
             (functor_identity C
                (functor_identity C y)))) @
   ! assoc ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y))
       (nat_trans_id
          (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) y)
       ((# (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))%cat
          (f · g)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y)))
     (! nat_trans_ax
          (nat_trans_id
             (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
          y w (f · g)) @
   assoc ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     (identity w) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y)
      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity y · (f · g))) (identity w)
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C) (identity y)
          (f · g)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity y · (f · g)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     (identity w)
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (id_left (f · g))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g)) (f · g)
     (identity w)
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g) @
   ! assoc f g (identity w) @
   maponpaths (compose f) (id_right g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr1 HL (functor_identity C y)
           (disp_functor_identity D₁ y yy))
        (disp_functor_identity D₂ w ww))
     (! id_left
          ((# (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))%cat
             (f · g)))
     (♯ (disp_functor_identity D₂) hh)) = hh

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 HL (functor_identity C y)
        (disp_functor_identity D₁ y yy))
     (disp_functor_identity D₂ w ww))
  (! id_left
       ((# (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))%cat
          (f · g)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity
        (functor_identity C (functor_identity C y)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y)
      · nat_trans_id
          (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) y)
     ((# (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))%cat
        (f · g))
     (! id_left
          (identity
             (functor_identity C
                (functor_identity C y)))) @
   ! assoc ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y))
       (nat_trans_id
          (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) y)
       ((# (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))%cat
          (f · g)) @
   maponpaths
     (compose
        ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y)))
     (! nat_trans_ax
          (nat_trans_id
             (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
          y w (f · g)) @
   assoc ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     (identity w) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (identity y)
      · (# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity y · (f · g))) (identity w)
     (! functor_comp (functor_identity C) (identity y)
          (f · g)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (identity y · (f · g)))
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g))
     (identity w)
     (maponpaths (# (functor_identity C))%cat
        (id_left (f · g))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     ((# (functor_identity C))%cat (f · g)) (f · g)
     (identity w)
     (functor_comp (functor_identity C) f g) @
   ! assoc f g (identity w) @
   maponpaths (compose f) (id_right g))
  (♯ (disp_functor_identity D₂) hh) = hh

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
transportf (mor_disp (L y yy) ww)
  (! id_left (f · g) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity y)
     (identity y · identity y) (f · g)
     (! id_left (identity y)) @
   ! assoc (identity y) (identity y) (f · g) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity y))
     (! is_nat_trans_id
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_identity_data C)
             (functor_identity_data C)) y w (f · g)) @
   assoc (identity y) (f · g) (identity w) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity y · (f · g))
     (f · g) (identity w)
     (maponpaths (λ f : C ⟦ y, w ⟧, f)
        (id_left (f · g))) @
   ! assoc f g (identity w) @
   maponpaths (compose f) (id_right g)) hh = hh

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
g: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
ww: D₂ w
hh: L y yy -->[ f · g] ww
isaset (C ⟦ y, w ⟧)

      apply homset_property.
    Qed.
  End Opcartesian.

  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
is_opcartesian_disp_functor L

  
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)

  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
is_opcartesian_disp_functor L

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
HL: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= HL: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= unit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= counit_over_id HL: disp_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
ww: D₂ w
g: C ⟦ functor_identity C x, w ⟧
hh: L y yy -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f · g] ww
∃! gg : L x xx -->[ g] ww, ♯ L ff ;; gg = hh

  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)

  (disp_functor_composite R L)

hh: L y yy -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f · g] ww
isaprop (∑ gg : L x xx -->[ g] ww, ♯ L ff ;; gg = hh)

 exact (is_opcartesian_equiv_over_id_fact Hff ww hh).

  (disp_functor_identity D₁)

Hff: is_opcartesian ff
w: C
ww: D₂ w
g: C ⟦ functor_identity C x, w ⟧
hh: L y yy -->[
(# (functor_identity C))%cat f · g] ww
(λ gg : L x xx -->[ g] ww, ♯ L ff ;; gg = hh)
  (is_opcartesian_equiv_over_id_fact Hff ww hh)
 exact (is_opcartesian_equiv_over_id_comm Hff ww hh).
  Defined.
End EquivIsOpcartesian.

(** * 8. Equivalences over the identity and equivalences *)
Section EquivalencesOverId.
  Context {C : category}
          {D₁ D₂ : disp_cat C}.

  Let F : adj_equiv C C
    := _ ,, identity_functor_is_adj_equivalence.

  Section ToEquiv.
    Context (L : disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂)
            (FF : is_equiv_over_id L).

    Let R : disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁ := pr1 FF.
    Let η : disp_nat_trans
              (adjunit F)
              (disp_functor_identity D₁)
              (disp_functor_composite L R)
      := pr1 (pr211 FF).
    Let ε : disp_nat_trans
              (adjcounit F)
              (disp_functor_composite R L)
              (disp_functor_identity D₂)
      := pr2 (pr211 FF).

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F:= functor_identity C,,
identity_functor_is_adj_equivalence: adj_equiv C C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
FF: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= pr1 FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= pr121 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= pr221 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
is_equiv_over F L

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F:= functor_identity C,,
identity_functor_is_adj_equivalence: adj_equiv C C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
FF: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= pr1 FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= pr121 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= pr221 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
is_equiv_over F L

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F:= functor_identity C,,
identity_functor_is_adj_equivalence: adj_equiv C C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
FF: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= pr1 FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= pr121 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= pr221 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
triangle_1_statement_over (R,, η,, ε)
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F:= functor_identity C,,
identity_functor_is_adj_equivalence: adj_equiv C C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
FF: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= pr1 FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= pr121 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= pr221 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
(λ _ : triangle_1_statement_over (R,, η,, ε),
 triangle_2_statement_over (R,, η,, ε)) ?pr1
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F:= functor_identity C,,
identity_functor_is_adj_equivalence: adj_equiv C C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
FF: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= pr1 FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= pr121 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= pr221 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
is_z_iso_disp (adjunitiso F x)
  (unit_over ((R,, η,, ε),, ?pr1,, ?pr2) x xx)
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F:= functor_identity C,,
identity_functor_is_adj_equivalence: adj_equiv C C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
FF: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= pr1 FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= pr121 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= pr221 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
(λ _ : ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
       is_z_iso_disp (adjunitiso F x)
         (unit_over ((R,, η,, ε),, ?pr1,, ?pr2) x xx),
 ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
 is_z_iso_disp (adjcounitiso F x)
   (counit_over ((R,, η,, ε),, ?pr1,, ?pr2) x xx))
  ?pr10

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F:= functor_identity C,,
identity_functor_is_adj_equivalence: adj_equiv C C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
FF: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= pr1 FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= pr121 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= pr221 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
triangle_1_statement_over (R,, η,, ε)
 abstract
          (intros x xx ; cbn ;
           refine (pr121 FF x xx @ _) ;
           apply maponpaths_2 ;
           apply homset_property).
      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F:= functor_identity C,,
identity_functor_is_adj_equivalence: adj_equiv C C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
FF: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= pr1 FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= pr121 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= pr221 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
(λ _ : triangle_1_statement_over (R,, η,, ε),
 triangle_2_statement_over (R,, η,, ε))
  is_equiv_over_id_to_is_equiv_over_subproof
 abstract
          (intros x xx ; cbn ;
           refine (pr221 FF x xx @ _) ;
           apply maponpaths_2 ;
           apply homset_property).
      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F:= functor_identity C,,
identity_functor_is_adj_equivalence: adj_equiv C C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
FF: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= pr1 FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= pr121 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= pr221 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
is_z_iso_disp (adjunitiso F x)
  (unit_over
     ((R,, η,, ε),,
      is_equiv_over_id_to_is_equiv_over_subproof,,
      is_equiv_over_id_to_is_equiv_over_subproof0) x
     xx)
 
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F:= functor_identity C,,
identity_functor_is_adj_equivalence: adj_equiv C C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
FF: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= pr1 FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= pr121 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= pr221 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₁ x
is_z_iso_disp (adjunitiso F x)
  (unit_over
     ((R,, η,, ε),,
      is_equiv_over_id_to_is_equiv_over_subproof,,
      is_equiv_over_id_to_is_equiv_over_subproof0) x
     xx)

        apply FF.
      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F:= functor_identity C,,
identity_functor_is_adj_equivalence: adj_equiv C C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
FF: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= pr1 FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= pr121 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= pr221 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
(λ _ : ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
       is_z_iso_disp (adjunitiso F x)
         (unit_over
            ((R,, η,, ε),,
             is_equiv_over_id_to_is_equiv_over_subproof,,
             is_equiv_over_id_to_is_equiv_over_subproof0)
            x xx),
 ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
 is_z_iso_disp (adjcounitiso F x)
   (counit_over
      ((R,, η,, ε),,
       is_equiv_over_id_to_is_equiv_over_subproof,,
       is_equiv_over_id_to_is_equiv_over_subproof0) x
      xx))
  (λ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
   let X := pr2 FF in let X0 := pr1 X in X0 x xx)
 
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F:= functor_identity C,,
identity_functor_is_adj_equivalence: adj_equiv C C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
FF: is_equiv_over_id L
R:= pr1 FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= pr121 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= pr221 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
is_z_iso_disp (adjcounitiso F x)
  (counit_over
     ((R,, η,, ε),,
      is_equiv_over_id_to_is_equiv_over_subproof,,
      is_equiv_over_id_to_is_equiv_over_subproof0) x
     xx)

        apply FF.
    Defined.
  End ToEquiv.

  Section ToEquivId.
    Context (L : disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂)
            (FF : is_equiv_over F L).

    Let R : disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁ := pr1 FF.
    Let η : disp_nat_trans
              (adjunit F)
              (disp_functor_identity D₁)
              (disp_functor_composite L R)
      := pr1 (pr211 FF).
    Let ε : disp_nat_trans
              (adjcounit F)
              (disp_functor_composite R L)
              (disp_functor_identity D₂)
      := pr2 (pr211 FF).

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F:= functor_identity C,,
identity_functor_is_adj_equivalence: adj_equiv C C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
FF: is_equiv_over F L
R:= pr1 FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= pr121 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= pr221 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
is_equiv_over_id L

    
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F:= functor_identity C,,
identity_functor_is_adj_equivalence: adj_equiv C C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
FF: is_equiv_over F L
R:= pr1 FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= pr121 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= pr221 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
is_equiv_over_id L

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F:= functor_identity C,,
identity_functor_is_adj_equivalence: adj_equiv C C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
FF: is_equiv_over F L
R:= pr1 FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= pr121 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= pr221 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
triangle_1_statement_over_id (R,, η,, ε)
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F:= functor_identity C,,
identity_functor_is_adj_equivalence: adj_equiv C C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
FF: is_equiv_over F L
R:= pr1 FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= pr121 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= pr221 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
(λ _ : triangle_1_statement_over_id (R,, η,, ε),
 triangle_2_statement_over_id (R,, η,, ε)) ?pr1
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F:= functor_identity C,,
identity_functor_is_adj_equivalence: adj_equiv C C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
FF: is_equiv_over F L
R:= pr1 FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= pr121 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= pr221 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (unit_over_id ((R,, η,, ε),, ?pr1,, ?pr2) x xx)
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F:= functor_identity C,,
identity_functor_is_adj_equivalence: adj_equiv C C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
FF: is_equiv_over F L
R:= pr1 FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= pr121 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= pr221 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
(λ _ : ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
       is_z_iso_disp
         (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
         (unit_over_id ((R,, η,, ε),, ?pr1,, ?pr2) x
            xx),
 ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
 is_z_iso_disp
   (identity_z_iso
      ((functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) x))
   (counit_over_id ((R,, η,, ε),, ?pr1,, ?pr2) x xx))
  ?pr10

      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F:= functor_identity C,,
identity_functor_is_adj_equivalence: adj_equiv C C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
FF: is_equiv_over F L
R:= pr1 FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= pr121 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= pr221 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
triangle_1_statement_over_id (R,, η,, ε)
 abstract
          (intros x xx ; cbn ;
           refine (pr121 FF x xx @ _) ;
           apply maponpaths_2 ;
           apply homset_property).
      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F:= functor_identity C,,
identity_functor_is_adj_equivalence: adj_equiv C C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
FF: is_equiv_over F L
R:= pr1 FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= pr121 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= pr221 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
(λ _ : triangle_1_statement_over_id (R,, η,, ε),
 triangle_2_statement_over_id (R,, η,, ε))
  is_equiv_over_to_is_equiv_over_id_subproof
 abstract
          (intros x xx ; cbn ;
           refine (pr221 FF x xx @ _) ;
           apply maponpaths_2 ;
           apply homset_property).
      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F:= functor_identity C,,
identity_functor_is_adj_equivalence: adj_equiv C C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
FF: is_equiv_over F L
R:= pr1 FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= pr121 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= pr221 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (unit_over_id
     ((R,, η,, ε),,
      is_equiv_over_to_is_equiv_over_id_subproof,,
      is_equiv_over_to_is_equiv_over_id_subproof0) x
     xx)
 
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F:= functor_identity C,,
identity_functor_is_adj_equivalence: adj_equiv C C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
FF: is_equiv_over F L
R:= pr1 FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= pr121 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= pr221 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₁ x
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
  (unit_over_id
     ((R,, η,, ε),,
      is_equiv_over_to_is_equiv_over_id_subproof,,
      is_equiv_over_to_is_equiv_over_id_subproof0) x
     xx)

        apply FF.
      
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F:= functor_identity C,,
identity_functor_is_adj_equivalence: adj_equiv C C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
FF: is_equiv_over F L
R:= pr1 FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= pr121 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= pr221 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
(λ _ : ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
       is_z_iso_disp
         (identity_z_iso (functor_identity C x))
         (unit_over_id
            ((R,, η,, ε),,
             is_equiv_over_to_is_equiv_over_id_subproof,,
             is_equiv_over_to_is_equiv_over_id_subproof0)
            x xx),
 ∏ (x : C) (xx : D₂ x),
 is_z_iso_disp
   (identity_z_iso
      ((functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) x))
   (counit_over_id
      ((R,, η,, ε),,
       is_equiv_over_to_is_equiv_over_id_subproof,,
       is_equiv_over_to_is_equiv_over_id_subproof0) x
      xx))
  (λ (x : C) (xx : D₁ x),
   let X := pr2 FF in let X0 := pr1 X in X0 x xx)
 
C: category
D₁, D₂: disp_cat C
F:= functor_identity C,,
identity_functor_is_adj_equivalence: adj_equiv C C
L: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
FF: is_equiv_over F L
R:= pr1 FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
η:= pr121 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjunit F)
  (disp_functor_identity D₁)
  (disp_functor_composite L R)
ε:= pr221 (pr1 FF): disp_nat_trans (adjcounit F)
  (disp_functor_composite R L)
  (disp_functor_identity D₂)
x: C
xx: D₂ x
is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso
     ((functor_identity C ∙ functor_identity C) x))
  (counit_over_id
     ((R,, η,, ε),,
      is_equiv_over_to_is_equiv_over_id_subproof,,
      is_equiv_over_to_is_equiv_over_id_subproof0) x
     xx)

        apply FF.
    Defined.
  End ToEquivId.
End EquivalencesOverId.
